```
1	# Architecture Rules
2	
3	## Mandatory Architecture
4	
5	The entire codebase MUST follow Domain Driven Design (DDD).
6	
7	No business logic may exist inside:
8	
9	- FastAPI routes
10	- Database repositories
11	- Infrastructure adapters
12	
13	Business logic belongs exclusively in the Domain layer.
14	
15	---
16	
17	## DDD Structure
18	
19	```
20	app/
21	    domain/
22	        asset/
23	        
24	        facility/
25	
26	        covenant/
27	
28	        calculations/
29	
30	    application/
31	        commands/
32	        queries/
33	        use_cases/
34	        registry.py   
35	
36	    infrastructure/
37	        database/
38	        repositories/
39	        publishers/
40	
41	    interfaces/
42	        api/ 
43	
44	    interfaces/
45	        api/
46	            routers/
47	            schemas/
48	
49	tests/
50	    unit/
51	    integration/
52	```
53	
54	---
55	
56	## Dependency Rule
57	
58	```
59	Interfaces
60	    ↓
61	Application
62	    ↓
63	Domain
64	```
65	
66	Infrastructure may depend on Domain.
67	
68	Domain must NEVER depend on:
69	
70	- FastAPI
71	- SQLAlchemy
72	- PostgreSQL
73	- Requests
74	- Web3
75	- Any infrastructure code
76	
77	Domain must be pure Python only can use pydantic to improve.
78	
79	---
80	
81	## Facility Extensibility
82	
83	Each facility must be implemented using the **Strategy Pattern**.
84	
85	New facilities must be addable without modifying existing calculation logic.
86	
87	Required abstractions:
88	
89	- `FacilityCalculator`
90	- `EligibilityPolicy`
91	- `FacilityMapper`
92	
93	Each facility provides its own implementation.
94	
95	```
96	FacilityCalculator
97	├── EducaCalculator
98	├── PayEarlyCalculator
99	└── NominaCalculator
100	```
101	
102	---
103	
104	## Repository Pattern
105	
106	Repositories must be defined as **interfaces in the Domain layer**.
107	
108	Example interface:
109	
110	```python
111	class CovenantReportRepository:
112	    ...
113	```
114	
115	Infrastructure provides the concrete implementation:
116	
117	``
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/.claude/plans/serene-tumbling-puffin.md","content":"# Plan: Fence Covenant Calculation Platform\n\n## Context\n\nImplement the full covenant calculation platform as specified in the tech challenge. The system must ingest portfolio data from three facilities, apply facility-specific eligibility filters and effective interest rate calculations, produce auditable covenant reports, and publish them to an immutable store. The architecture must follow DDD strictly, with a Strategy Pattern per facility and a Publisher abstraction supporting both Database and Smart Contract backends.\n\n---\n\n## Directory Structure\n\n```\napp/\n    domain/\n        asset/\n            base.py            # BaseAsset (Pydantic, Decimal fields)\n            educa.py           # EducaAsset\n            payearly.py        # PayEarlyAsset\n            nomina.py          # NominaAsset\n        facility/\n            interfaces.py      # FacilityCalculator, EligibilityPolicy, FacilityMapper (ABC)\n        covenant/\n            entities.py        # CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset\n            repository.py      # CovenantReportRepository (ABC)\n        calculations/\n            educa.py           # EducaCalculator, EducaEligibilityPolicy, EducaMapper\n            payearly.py        # PayEarlyCalculator, PayEarlyEligibilityPolicy, PayEarlyMapper\n            nomina.py          # NominaCalculator, NominaEligibilityPolicy, NominaMapper\n        publishers/\n            interface.py       # Publisher (ABC)\n        errors.py              # FacilityNotSupported, InvalidPortfolioData, CovenantCalculationError, CovenantPublicationError\n\n    application/\n        commands/\n            calculate_covenant.py   # CalculateCovenantCommand\n        queries/\n            get_report.py           # GetCovenantReportQuery\n        use_cases/\n            calculate_covenant.py   # CalculateCovenantUseCase\n            get_covenant_report.py  # GetCovenantReportUseCase\n        registry.py                 # FacilityRegistry\n\n    infrastructure/\n        database/\n            base.py            # SQLAlchemy Base\n            models.py          # CovenantReportModel\n            session.py         # engine + get_session\n        repositories/\n            postgres_covenant_report_repository.py\n        publishers/\n            database_publisher.py\n            smart_contract_publisher.py  # Stub\n\n    interfaces/\n        api/\n            routers/\n                covenants.py\n            schemas/\n                request.py\n                response.py\n            dependencies.py    # DI wiring\n            exception_handlers.py\n\n    main.py\n    settings.py\n\ntests/\n    unit/\n        domain/\n            calculations/\n                test_educa_calculator.py\n                test_payearly_calculator.py\n                test_nomina_calculator.py\n        application/\n            test_calculate_covenant_use_case.py\n            test_registry.py\n    integration/\n        test_postgres_repository.py\n        test_api_covenants.py\n    conftest.py\n\ndata/\n    facility_a_educa_isa.json\n    facility_b_payearly_ewa.json\n    facility_c_nomina.json\n\nalembic/\n    versions/\n        0001_create_covenant_reports.py\n\npyproject.toml\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\n.flake8\nmypy.ini\n.pre-commit-config.yaml\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Phases\n\n### Phase 1 — Project Scaffolding\n\n**pyproject.toml** (UV, all deps)\n- Runtime: `fastapi`, `uvicorn[standard]`, `pydantic`, `pydantic-settings`, `sqlalchemy`, `psycopg2-binary`, `alembic`\n- Test: `pytest`, `pytest-cov`, `pytest-mock`, `pytest-asyncio`, `httpx`\n- Dev: `mypy`, `flake8`, `black`, `pre-commit`\n\n**settings.py** — Pydantic Settings loading from env:\n```python\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    database_url: str\n    publisher_backend: str = \"database\"  # \"database\" | \"smart_contract\"\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n```\n\n**docker-compose.yml** — two services: `api` (FastAPI on port 8000) + `postgres` (port 5432). API depends on postgres. Uses `.env` file for config.\n\n**Dockerfile** — multi-stage: install deps with UV, copy app, run with uvicorn.\n\n**.pre-commit-config.yaml** — hooks: `black`, `flake8`, `mypy`, `pytest`, `end-of-file-fixer`, `trailing-whitespace`.\n\n**pytest coverage config** in `pyproject.toml`:\n```toml\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\naddopts = \"--cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90\"\n\n[tool.coverage.run]\nsource = [\"app\"]\n\n[tool.coverage.report]\nfail_under = 90\n# 100% for calculations and eligibility enforced per-module\n```\n\n---\n\n### Phase 2 — Domain Layer (TDD)\n\n#### 2.1 `app/domain/errors.py`\nFour domain exceptions (no inheritance from HTTPException).\n\n#### 2.2 Asset models (`app/domain/asset/`)\n\n`base.py`:\n```python\nclass BaseAsset(BaseModel):\n    external_id: str\n    amount: Decimal\n    is_eligible: bool\n```\n\n`educa.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `loan_status`, `outstanding_amount: Decimal`, `interest_rate_percentage: Optional[Decimal]`, `effective_date`, `reporting_date`, `student_id`, `school_id`, `days_past_due`, `country`\n\n`payearly.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `outstanding_principal_amount: Decimal`, `total_principal_amount: Decimal`, `total_fee_amount: Decimal`, `created_at: datetime`, `due_date: date`, `days_past_due`, `receivable_currency`\n\n`nomina.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `outstanding_amount: Decimal`, `fee_percentage: Decimal`, `fee_amount: Decimal`, `origination_date: date`, `maturity_date: str` (DD/MM/YYYY), `net_monthly_salary: Decimal`, `advance_amount: Decimal`, `repaid_amount: Decimal`\n\n#### 2.3 `app/domain/facility/interfaces.py`\n```python\nclass EligibilityPolicy(ABC):\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]: ...\n\nclass FacilityMapper(ABC):\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> BaseAsset: ...\n\nclass FacilityCalculator(ABC):\n    def calculate(self, assets: list[dict], facility_id: str, correlation_id: str) -> CovenantReport: ...\n```\n\n#### 2.4 `app/domain/covenant/entities.py`\n```python\nclass CovenantStatus(str, Enum):\n    COMPLIANT = \"COMPLIANT\"\n    BREACH = \"BREACH\"\n\nclass ExcludedAsset(BaseModel):\n    external_id: str\n    reasons: list[str]\n\nclass CovenantReport(BaseModel):\n    report_id: UUID\n    facility_id: str\n    effective_rate: Decimal       # stored as percentage value, e.g. Decimal(\"19.43\")\n    status: CovenantStatus\n    total_assets: int\n    included_assets: list[str]\n    excluded_assets: list[ExcludedAsset]\n    computed_at: datetime\n    correlation_id: str\n```\n\n#### 2.5 `app/domain/covenant/repository.py`\n```python\nclass CovenantReportRepository(ABC):\n    def save(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None: ...\n    def find_by_id(self, report_id: UUID) -> Optional[CovenantReport]: ...\n    def find_by_facility(self, facility_id: str) -> list[CovenantReport]: ...\n```\n\n#### 2.6 `app/domain/publishers/interface.py`\n```python\nclass Publisher(ABC):\n    def publish(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None: ...\n```\n\n---\n\n### Phase 3 — Calculations (100% coverage, TDD)\n\nAll math uses `Decimal`. Never `float`. Round to 2dp with `ROUND_HALF_UP`.\n\n#### Facility A — Educa Capital I\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks** (each failed check adds a reason string):\n1. `status.lower() == \"open\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `loan_status == \"current\"`\n4. `interest_rate_percentage is not None`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × interest_rate_percentage_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"22.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**EducaMapper** — handles inconsistent status casing (\"open\"/\"Open\"/\"OPEN\"), maps raw dict to `EducaAsset`. Raises `InvalidPortfolioData` on missing required fields.\n\n#### Facility B — PayEarly US\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks:**\n1. `status.lower() == \"performing\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `outstanding_principal_amount > 0`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\ntenor_days_i = (due_date - created_at.date()).days\nfee_yield_i = (total_fee_amount_i / total_principal_amount_i) × (365 / tenor_days_i)\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_principal_amount_i × fee_yield_i) / Σ(outstanding_principal_amount_i)\n```\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"3.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**PayEarlyMapper** — parses ISO 8601 datetime for `created_at`, date string for `due_date`.\n\n#### Facility C — Nomina Express I\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks:**\n1. `status.lower() == \"active\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `outstanding_amount > 0`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\nrepayment_months_i = months between origination_date and maturity_date\nannualized_fee_i = fee_percentage_i × (12 / repayment_months_i)\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × annualized_fee_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\nWhere `maturity_date` is in `DD/MM/YYYY` format — the mapper parses it.\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"5.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**NominaMapper** — parses `DD/MM/YYYY` maturity_date, computes `repayment_months` as calendar month difference (relativedelta or manual arithmetic with Decimal).\n\n---\n\n### Phase 4 — Application Layer\n\n**`app/application/registry.py`**\n```python\nclass FacilityRegistry:\n    _calculators: dict[str, FacilityCalculator]\n\n    def register(self, facility_id: str, calculator: FacilityCalculator): ...\n    def get(self, facility_id: str) -> FacilityCalculator:\n        # raises FacilityNotSupported if not found\n```\n\n**`app/application/use_cases/calculate_covenant.py`**\n```python\nclass CalculateCovenantUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: Ingest raw portfolio JSON, run facility-specific eligibility\n    and calculation, produce a CovenantReport, and publish it immutably.\n    Assumptions: facility_id maps to a registered FacilityCalculator.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, registry, repository, publisher): ...\n    def execute(self, command: CalculateCovenantCommand) -> CovenantReport: ...\n```\nFlow: `registry.get(facility_id)` → `calculator.calculate(assets, ...)` → `repository.save(report)` → `publisher.publish(report)` → return report\n\n**`app/application/use_cases/get_covenant_report.py`**\nSimple query use case — fetches by ID from repository.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 5 — Infrastructure Layer\n\n**`app/infrastructure/database/models.py`** — SQLAlchemy ORM model:\n```\ncovenant_reports: id (UUID PK), facility_id, effective_rate (Numeric(20,10)),\nstatus, total_assets, included_assets (JSON), excluded_assets (JSON),\ncomputed_at, correlation_id, published_at\n```\n\n**`app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_covenant_report_repository.py`** — implements the domain interface using SQLAlchemy Session.\n\n**`app/infrastructure/publishers/database_publisher.py`** — calls `repository.save()` and marks `published_at`. The immutability guarantee: published reports are never overwritten; each calculation creates a new row.\n\n**`app/infrastructure/publishers/smart_contract_publisher.py`** — stub that logs intent but delegates to DB. Documents the extension point.\n\n**Alembic migration** — creates `covenant_reports` table.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 6 — API Layer\n\n**Three endpoints** in `app/interfaces/api/routers/covenants.py`:\n\n| Method | Path | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| `POST` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/calculate` | Ingest assets JSON, run calculation, return report |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports/{report_id}` | Fetch a specific report |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports` | List all reports for a facility |\n\n`POST` body: `{ \"assets\": [...] }` — raw JSON array from originator.\n`X-Correlation-ID` header accepted (auto-generated if absent).\n\n**Response schema:**\n```json\n{\n  \"report_id\": \"uuid\",\n  \"facility_id\": \"facility-a\",\n  \"effective_rate\": \"19.43\",\n  \"status\": \"COMPLIANT\",\n  \"threshold\": \"22.00\",\n  \"summary\": { \"total\": 8, \"included\": 5, \"excluded\": 3 },\n  \"included_assets\": [\"EDU-STU-10001\", ...],\n  \"excluded_assets\": [{ \"external_id\": \"EDU-STU-10003\", \"reasons\": [\"loan_status != current\"] }],\n  \"computed_at\": \"2026-06-12T...\"\n}\n```\n\n**Exception handlers** in `exception_handlers.py` convert domain errors to HTTP:\n- `FacilityNotSupported` → 404\n- `InvalidPortfolioData` → 422\n- `CovenantCalculationError` → 500\n- `CovenantPublicationError` → 500\n\n**DI wiring** in `app/interfaces/api/dependencies.py`:\n- Registry is a singleton populated at startup with all three facility calculators\n- Session scoped per-request\n- Publisher selected based on `settings.publisher_backend`\n\n---\n\n### Phase 7 — Sample Data Files\n\nCreate `data/facility_a_educa_isa.json`, `data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json`, `data/facility_c_nomina.json` with the exact data from the PDF.\n\nThese are used in integration tests and for manual verification.\n\n**Pre-computed expected results** (for test assertions):\n\n**Facility A — Educa** — Eligible: EDU-10001, 10002, 10004, 10005, 10007 (status=open/Open/OPEN, loan_status=current, is_eligible=true, rate not null). Excluded: 10003 (delinquent), 10006 (closed/written_off), 10008 (rate=null).\nFormula: `Σ(outstanding × rate) / Σ(outstanding)` over eligible set.\n\n**Facility B — PayEarly** — Eligible: status=\"performing\"/\"PERFORMING\"/\"Performing\", is_eligible=true, outstanding_principal > 0.\nFormula: fee_yield per asset annualized by tenor, then weighted average.\n\n**Facility C — Nomina** — Eligible: status=\"active\"/\"ACTIVE\", is_eligible=true, outstanding_amount > 0.\nFormula: annualized fee weighted by outstanding.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 8 — Testing\n\n**Unit tests** (`tests/unit/`):\n- `test_educa_calculator.py` — test each eligibility rule independently, test formula with known inputs, test COMPLIANT/BREACH threshold boundary, test empty eligible set raises `CovenantCalculationError`\n- `test_payearly_calculator.py` — same structure; test tenor_days computation, annualization\n- `test_nomina_calculator.py` — same structure; test DD/MM/YYYY parsing, repayment_months computation\n- `test_calculate_covenant_use_case.py` — mock registry, repository, publisher; verify orchestration\n- `test_registry.py` — register/get/FacilityNotSupported\n\n**Integration tests** (`tests/integration/`):\n- `test_postgres_repository.py` — real PostgreSQL (pytest fixture spins up via docker or env var); save + find_by_id + find_by_facility\n- `test_api_covenants.py` — FastAPI `TestClient`; POST with full Facility A/B/C sample data; assert status codes, response shape, COMPLIANT/BREACH result; GET by report_id; 404 on unknown facility\n\n**Coverage enforcement:**\n```toml\n[tool.coverage.report]\nfail_under = 90\nexclude_lines = [\"pragma: no cover\", \"if TYPE_CHECKING\"]\n```\nCalculations module gets a per-file `# pragma: no branch` policy — the CI command runs `pytest --cov=app/domain/calculations --cov-fail-under=100` separately.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 9 — README\n\nSections:\n1. **Overview** — what the platform does\n2. **Architecture** — DDD layers, dependency rule diagram\n3. **Facility Extensibility** — how Strategy Pattern makes adding a new facility a 3-file addition (mapper + eligibility + calculator, register in wiring)\n4. **Covenant Model** — why immutability matters, how Publisher abstraction enables Smart Contract swap-in\n5. **Trade-offs** — Decimal vs float, sync vs async API, DB vs Smart Contract, JSON storage for report assets\n6. **Production Evolution** — async SQLAlchemy, Smart Contract publisher, event sourcing for audit trail\n7. **Setup & Usage** — `docker compose up`, sample `curl` commands\n\n---\n\n## Verification\n\n```bash\n# Start the system\ndocker compose up --build\n\n# Run full test suite\ndocker compose run api pytest --cov=app --cov-fail-under=90\n\n# Static analysis\nblack --check .\nflake8 .\nmypy app\n\n# Smoke test — Facility A\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_a_educa_isa.json\n# Expected: effective_rate ~19.43, status COMPLIANT (< 22%)\n\n# Smoke test — Facility B\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json\n\n# Smoke test — Facility C\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-c/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_c_nomina.json\n```\n"}
```

BaseAsset (Pydantic, Decimal fields)\n            educa.py           # EducaAsset\n            payearly.py        # PayEarlyAsset\n            nomina.py          # NominaAsset\n        facility/\n            interfaces.py      # FacilityCalculator, EligibilityPolicy, FacilityMapper (ABC)\n        covenant/\n            entities.py        # CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset\n            repository.py      # CovenantReportRepository (ABC)\n        calculations/\n            educa.py           # EducaCalculator, EducaEligibilityPolicy, EducaMapper\n            payearly.py        # PayEarlyCalculator, PayEarlyEligibilityPolicy, PayEarlyMapper\n            nomina.py          # NominaCalculator, NominaEligibilityPolicy, NominaMapper\n        publishers/\n            interface.py       # Publisher (ABC)\n        errors.py              # FacilityNotSupported, InvalidPortfolioData, CovenantCalculationError, CovenantPublicationError\n\n    application/\n        commands/\n            calculate_covenant.py   # CalculateCovenantCommand\n        queries/\n            get_report.py           # GetCovenantReportQuery\n        use_cases/\n            calculate_covenant.py   # CalculateCovenantUseCase\n            get_covenant_report.py  # GetCovenantReportUseCase\n        registry.py                 # FacilityRegistry\n\n    infrastructure/\n        database/\n            base.py            # SQLAlchemy Base\n            models.py          # CovenantReportModel\n            session.py         # engine + get_session\n        repositories/\n            postgres_covenant_report_repository.py\n        publishers/\n            database_publisher.py\n            smart_contract_publisher.py  # Stub\n\n    interfaces/\n        api/\n            routers/\n                covenants.py\n            schemas/\n                request.py\n                response.py\n            dependencies.py    # DI wiring\n            exception_handlers.py\n\n    main.py\n    settings.py\n\ntests/\n    unit/\n        domain/\n            calculations/\n                test_educa_calculator.py\n                test_payearly_calculator.py\n                test_nomina_calculator.py\n        application/\n            test_calculate_covenant_use_case.py\n            test_registry.py\n    integration/\n        test_postgres_repository.py\n        test_api_covenants.py\n    conftest.py\n\ndata/\n    facility_a_educa_isa.json\n    facility_b_payearly_ewa.json\n    facility_c_nomina.json\n\nalembic/\n    versions/\n        0001_create_covenant_reports.py\n\npyproject.toml\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\n.flake8\nmypy.ini\n.pre-commit-config.yaml\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Phases\n\n### Phase 1 — Project Scaffolding\n\n**pyproject.toml** (UV, all deps)\n- Runtime: `fastapi`, `uvicorn[standard]`, `pydantic`, `pydantic-settings`, `sqlalchemy`, `psycopg2-binary`, `alembic`\n- Test: `pytest`, `pytest-cov`, `pytest-mock`, `pytest-asyncio`, `httpx`\n- Dev: `mypy`, `flake8`, `black`, `pre-commit`\n\n**settings.py** — Pydantic Settings loading from env:\n```python\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    database_url: str\n    publisher_backend: str = \"database\"  # \"database\" | \"smart_contract\"\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n```\n\n**docker-compose.yml** — two services: `api` (FastAPI on port 8000) + `postgres` (port 5432). API depends on postgres. Uses `.env` file for config.\n\n**Dockerfile** — multi-stage: install deps with UV, copy app, run with uvicorn.\n\n**.pre-commit-config.yaml** — hooks: `black`, `flake8`, `mypy`, `pytest`, `end-of-file-fixer`, `trailing-whitespace`.\n\n**pytest coverage config** in `pyproject.toml`:\n```toml\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\naddopts = \"--cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90\"\n\n[tool.coverage.run]\nsource = [\"app\"]\n\n[tool.coverage.report]\nfail_under = 90\n# 100% for calculations and eligibility enforced per-module\n```\n\n---\n\n### Phase 2 — Domain Layer (TDD)\n\n#### 2.1 `app/domain/errors.py`\nFour domain exceptions (no inheritance from HTTPException).\n\n#### 2.2 Asset models (`app/domain/asset/`)\n\n`base.py`:\n```python\nclass BaseAsset(BaseModel):\n    external_id: str\n    amount: Decimal\n    is_eligible: bool\n```\n\n`educa.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `loan_status`, `outstanding_amount: Decimal`, `interest_rate_percentage: Optional[Decimal]`, `effective_date`, `reporting_date`, `student_id`, `school_id`, `days_past_due`, `country`\n\n`payearly.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `outstanding_principal_amount: Decimal`, `total_principal_amount: Decimal`, `total_fee_amount: Decimal`, `created_at: datetime`, `due_date: date`, `days_past_due`, `receivable_currency`\n\n`nomina.py` — extends BaseAsset with: `status`, `outstanding_amount: Decimal`, `fee_percentage: Decimal`, `fee_amount: Decimal`, `origination_date: date`, `maturity_date: str` (DD/MM/YYYY), `net_monthly_salary: Decimal`, `advance_amount: Decimal`, `repaid_amount: Decimal`\n\n#### 2.3 `app/domain/facility/interfaces.py`\n```python\nclass EligibilityPolicy(ABC):\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]: ...\n\nclass FacilityMapper(ABC):\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> BaseAsset: ...\n\nclass FacilityCalculator(ABC):\n    def calculate(self, assets: list[dict], facility_id: str, correlation_id: str) -> CovenantReport: ...\n```\n\n#### 2.4 `app/domain/covenant/entities.py`\n```python\nclass CovenantStatus(str, Enum):\n    COMPLIANT = \"COMPLIANT\"\n    BREACH = \"BREACH\"\n\nclass ExcludedAsset(BaseModel):\n    external_id: str\n    reasons: list[str]\n\nclass CovenantReport(BaseModel):\n    report_id: UUID\n    facility_id: str\n    effective_rate: Decimal       # stored as percentage value, e.g. Decimal(\"19.43\")\n    status: CovenantStatus\n    total_assets: int\n    included_assets: list[str]\n    excluded_assets: list[ExcludedAsset]\n    computed_at: datetime\n    correlation_id: str\n```\n\n#### 2.5 `app/domain/covenant/repository.py`\n```python\nclass CovenantReportRepository(ABC):\n    def save(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None: ...\n    def find_by_id(self, report_id: UUID) -> Optional[CovenantReport]: ...\n    def find_by_facility(self, facility_id: str) -> list[CovenantReport]: ...\n```\n\n#### 2.6 `app/domain/publishers/interface.py`\n```python\nclass Publisher(ABC):\n    def publish(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None: ...\n```\n\n---\n\n### Phase 3 — Calculations (100% coverage, TDD)\n\nAll math uses `Decimal`. Never `float`. Round to 2dp with `ROUND_HALF_UP`.\n\n#### Facility A — Educa Capital I\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks** (each failed check adds a reason string):\n1. `status.lower() == \"open\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `loan_status == \"current\"`\n4. `interest_rate_percentage is not None`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × interest_rate_percentage_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"22.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**EducaMapper** — handles inconsistent status casing (\"open\"/\"Open\"/\"OPEN\"), maps raw dict to `EducaAsset`. Raises `InvalidPortfolioData` on missing required fields.\n\n#### Facility B — PayEarly US\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks:**\n1. `status.lower() == \"performing\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `outstanding_principal_amount > 0`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\ntenor_days_i = (due_date - created_at.date()).days\nfee_yield_i = (total_fee_amount_i / total_principal_amount_i) × (365 / tenor_days_i)\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_principal_amount_i × fee_yield_i) / Σ(outstanding_principal_amount_i)\n```\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"3.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**PayEarlyMapper** — parses ISO 8601 datetime for `created_at`, date string for `due_date`.\n\n#### Facility C — Nomina Express I\n\n**EligibilityPolicy checks:**\n1. `status.lower() == \"active\"`\n2. `is_eligible == True`\n3. `outstanding_amount > 0`\n\n**Formula:**\n```\nrepayment_months_i = months between origination_date and maturity_date\nannualized_fee_i = fee_percentage_i × (12 / repayment_months_i)\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × annualized_fee_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\nWhere `maturity_date` is in `DD/MM/YYYY` format — the mapper parses it.\nThreshold: `< Decimal(\"5.0\")` → COMPLIANT, else BREACH\n\n**NominaMapper** — parses `DD/MM/YYYY` maturity_date, computes `repayment_months` as calendar month difference (relativedelta or manual arithmetic with Decimal).\n\n---\n\n### Phase 4 — Application Layer\n\n**`app/application/registry.py`**\n```python\nclass FacilityRegistry:\n    _calculators: dict[str, FacilityCalculator]\n\n    def register(self, facility_id: str, calculator: FacilityCalculator): ...\n    def get(self, facility_id: str) -> FacilityCalculator:\n        # raises FacilityNotSupported if not found\n```\n\n**`app/application/use_cases/calculate_covenant.py`**\n```python\nclass CalculateCovenantUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: Ingest raw portfolio JSON, run facility-specific eligibility\n    and calculation, produce a CovenantReport, and publish it immutably.\n    Assumptions: facility_id maps to a registered FacilityCalculator.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, registry, repository, publisher): ...\n    def execute(self, command: CalculateCovenantCommand) -> CovenantReport: ...\n```\nFlow: `registry.get(facility_id)` → `calculator.calculate(assets, ...)` → `repository.save(report)` → `publisher.publish(report)` → return report\n\n**`app/application/use_cases/get_covenant_report.py`**\nSimple query use case — fetches by ID from repository.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 5 — Infrastructure Layer\n\n**`app/infrastructure/database/models.py`** — SQLAlchemy ORM model:\n```\ncovenant_reports: id (UUID PK), facility_id, effective_rate (Numeric(20,10)),\nstatus, total_assets, included_assets (JSON), excluded_assets (JSON),\ncomputed_at, correlation_id, published_at\n```\n\n**`app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_covenant_report_repository.py`** — implements the domain interface using SQLAlchemy Session.\n\n**`app/infrastructure/publishers/database_publisher.py`** — calls `repository.save()` and marks `published_at`. The immutability guarantee: published reports are never overwritten; each calculation creates a new row.\n\n**`app/infrastructure/publishers/smart_contract_publisher.py`** — stub that logs intent but delegates to DB. Documents the extension point.\n\n**Alembic migration** — creates `covenant_reports` table.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 6 — API Layer\n\n**Three endpoints** in `app/interfaces/api/routers/covenants.py`:\n\n| Method | Path | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| `POST` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/calculate` | Ingest assets JSON, run calculation, return report |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports/{report_id}` | Fetch a specific report |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports` | List all reports for a facility |\n\n`POST` body: `{ \"assets\": [...] }` — raw JSON array from originator.\n`X-Correlation-ID` header accepted (auto-generated if absent).\n\n**Response schema:**\n```json\n{\n  \"report_id\": \"uuid\",\n  \"facility_id\": \"facility-a\",\n  \"effective_rate\": \"19.43\",\n  \"status\": \"COMPLIANT\",\n  \"threshold\": \"22.00\",\n  \"summary\": { \"total\": 8, \"included\": 5, \"excluded\": 3 },\n  \"included_assets\": [\"EDU-STU-10001\", ...],\n  \"excluded_assets\": [{ \"external_id\": \"EDU-STU-10003\", \"reasons\": [\"loan_status != current\"] }],\n  \"computed_at\": \"2026-06-12T...\"\n}\n```\n\n**Exception handlers** in `exception_handlers.py` convert domain errors to HTTP:\n- `FacilityNotSupported` → 404\n- `InvalidPortfolioData` → 422\n- `CovenantCalculationError` → 500\n- `CovenantPublicationError` → 500\n\n**DI wiring** in `app/interfaces/api/dependencies.py`:\n- Registry is a singleton populated at startup with all three facility calculators\n- Session scoped per-request\n- Publisher selected based on `settings.publisher_backend`\n\n---\n\n### Phase 7 — Sample Data Files\n\nCreate `data/facility_a_educa_isa.json`, `data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json`, `data/facility_c_nomina.json` with the exact data from the PDF.\n\nThese are used in integration tests and for manual verification.\n\n**Pre-computed expected results** (for test assertions):\n\n**Facility A — Educa** — Eligible: EDU-10001, 10002, 10004, 10005, 10007 (status=open/Open/OPEN, loan_status=current, is_eligible=true, rate not null). Excluded: 10003 (delinquent), 10006 (closed/written_off), 10008 (rate=null).\nFormula: `Σ(outstanding × rate) / Σ(outstanding)` over eligible set.\n\n**Facility B — PayEarly** — Eligible: status=\"performing\"/\"PERFORMING\"/\"Performing\", is_eligible=true, outstanding_principal > 0.\nFormula: fee_yield per asset annualized by tenor, then weighted average.\n\n**Facility C — Nomina** — Eligible: status=\"active\"/\"ACTIVE\", is_eligible=true, outstanding_amount > 0.\nFormula: annualized fee weighted by outstanding.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 8 — Testing\n\n**Unit tests** (`tests/unit/`):\n- `test_educa_calculator.py` — test each eligibility rule independently, test formula with known inputs, test COMPLIANT/BREACH threshold boundary, test empty eligible set raises `CovenantCalculationError`\n- `test_payearly_calculator.py` — same structure; test tenor_days computation, annualization\n- `test_nomina_calculator.py` — same structure; test DD/MM/YYYY parsing, repayment_months computation\n- `test_calculate_covenant_use_case.py` — mock registry, repository, publisher; verify orchestration\n- `test_registry.py` — register/get/FacilityNotSupported\n\n**Integration tests** (`tests/integration/`):\n- `test_postgres_repository.py` — real PostgreSQL (pytest fixture spins up via docker or env var); save + find_by_id + find_by_facility\n- `test_api_covenants.py` — FastAPI `TestClient`; POST with full Facility A/B/C sample data; assert status codes, response shape, COMPLIANT/BREACH result; GET by report_id; 404 on unknown facility\n\n**Coverage enforcement:**\n```toml\n[tool.coverage.report]\nfail_under = 90\nexclude_lines = [\"pragma: no cover\", \"if TYPE_CHECKING\"]\n```\nCalculations module gets a per-file `# pragma: no branch` policy — the CI command runs `pytest --cov=app/domain/calculations --cov-fail-under=100` separately.\n\n---\n\n### Phase 9 — README\n\nSections:\n1. **Overview** — what the platform does\n2. **Architecture** — DDD layers, dependency rule diagram\n3. **Facility Extensibility** — how Strategy Pattern makes adding a new facility a 3-file addition (mapper + eligibility + calculator, register in wiring)\n4. **Covenant Model** — why immutability matters, how Publisher abstraction enables Smart Contract swap-in\n5. **Trade-offs** — Decimal vs float, sync vs async API, DB vs Smart Contract, JSON storage for report assets\n6. **Production Evolution** — async SQLAlchemy, Smart Contract publisher, event sourcing for audit trail\n7. **Setup & Usage** — `docker compose up`, sample `curl` commands\n\n---\n\n## Verification\n\n```bash\n# Start the system\ndocker compose up --build\n\n# Run full test suite\ndocker compose run api pytest --cov=app --cov-fail-under=90\n\n# Static analysis\nblack --check .\nflake8 .\nmypy app\n\n# Smoke test — Facility A\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_a_educa_isa.json\n# Expected: effective_rate ~19.43, status COMPLIANT (< 22%)\n\n# Smoke test — Facility B\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json\n\n# Smoke test — Facility C\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-c/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_c_nomina.json\n```\n","planFilePath":"/home/antonio/.claude/plans/serene-tumbling-puffin.md"}
```

## Approved Plan:
# Plan: Fence Covenant Calculation Platform

## Context

Implement the full covenant calculation platform as specified in the tech challenge. The system must ingest portfolio data from three facilities, apply facility-specific eligibility filters and effective interest rate calculations, produce auditable covenant reports, and publish them to an immutable store. The architecture must follow DDD strictly, with a Strategy Pattern per facility and a Publisher abstraction supporting both Database and Smart Contract backends.

---

## Directory Structure

```
app/
    domain/
        asset/
            base.py            # BaseAsset (Pydantic, Decimal fields)
            educa.py           # EducaAsset
            payearly.py        # PayEarlyAsset
            nomina.py          # NominaAsset
        facility/
            interfaces.py      # FacilityCalculator, EligibilityPolicy, FacilityMapper (ABC)
        covenant/
            entities.py        # CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset
            repository.py      # CovenantReportRepository (ABC)
        calculations/
            educa.py           # EducaCalculator, EducaEligibilityPolicy, EducaMapper
            payearly.py        # PayEarlyCalculator, PayEarlyEligibilityPolicy, PayEarlyMapper
            nomina.py          # NominaCalculator, NominaEligibilityPolicy, NominaMapper
        publishers/
            interface.py       # Publisher (ABC)
        errors.py              # FacilityNotSupported, InvalidPortfolioData, CovenantCalculationError, CovenantPublicationError

    application/
        commands/
            calculate_covenant.py   # CalculateCovenantCommand
        queries/
            get_report.py           # GetCovenantReportQuer
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/alembic/env.py","content":"from logging.config import fileConfig\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import engine_from_config, pool\n\nfrom alembic import context\n\nconfig = context.config\n\nif config.config_file_name is not None:\n    fileConfig(config.config_file_name)\n\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.base import Base  # noqa: E402\nfrom app.infrastructure.database import models  # noqa: E402, F401\n\ntarget_metadata = Base.metadata\n\n\ndef run_migrations_offline() -> None:\n    url = config.get_main_option(\"sqlalchemy.url\")\n    context.configure(\n        url=url,\n        target_metadata=target_metadata,\n        literal_binds=True,\n        dialect_opts={\"paramstyle\": \"named\"},\n    )\n    with context.begin_transaction():\n        context.run_migrations()\n\n\ndef run_migrations_online() -> None:\n    connectable = engine_from_config(\n        config.get_section(config.config_ini_section, {}),\n        prefix=\"sqlalchemy.\",\n        poolclass=pool.NullPool,\n    )\n    with connectable.connect() as connection:\n        context.configure(connection=connection, target_metadata=target_metadata)\n        with context.begin_transaction():\n            context.run_migrations()\n\n\nif context.is_offline_mode():\n    run_migrations_offline()\nelse:\n    run_migrations_online()\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/domain/facility/interfaces.py","content":"from abc import ABC, abstractmethod\n\nfrom app.domain.asset.base import BaseAsset\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport\n\n\nclass EligibilityPolicy(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    Determines whether an asset qualifies for inclusion in the covenant calculation.\n\n    Inputs: a domain asset.\n    Outputs: (is_eligible, reasons) — reasons is non-empty only when ineligible.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]: ...\n\n\nclass FacilityMapper(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    Translates raw originator JSON (dict) into a typed domain asset.\n\n    Inputs: raw dict from the originator's portfolio export.\n    Outputs: a typed BaseAsset subclass.\n    Raises: InvalidPortfolioData on missing or malformed fields.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> BaseAsset: ...  # type: ignore[type-arg]\n\n\nclass FacilityCalculator(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    Orchestrates eligibility filtering and rate calculation for one facility.\n\n    Inputs: raw asset dicts, facility_id, correlation_id.\n    Outputs: CovenantReport.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def calculate(\n        self,\n        raw_assets: list[dict],  # type: ignore[type-arg]\n        facility_id: str,\n        correlation_id: str,\n    ) -> CovenantReport: ...\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/unit/domain/calculations/test_educa_calculator.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.domain.calculations.educa import (\n    EducaCalculator,\n    EducaEligibilityPolicy,\n    EducaMapper,\n)\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantStatus\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantCalculationError, InvalidPortfolioData\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# EducaEligibilityPolicy\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass TestEducaEligibilityPolicy:\n    def setup_method(self) -> None:\n        self.policy = EducaEligibilityPolicy()\n\n    def _base_raw(self) -> dict:\n        return {\n            \"external_id\": \"EDU-001\",\n            \"status\": \"open\",\n            \"is_eligible\": True,\n            \"loan_status\": \"current\",\n            \"interest_rate_percentage\": 20.0,\n            \"outstanding_amount\": 5000.0,\n            \"disbursement_amount\": 5000.0,\n            \"repaid_amount\": 0.0,\n            \"effective_date\": \"2024-01-01\",\n            \"reporting_date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n            \"student_id\": \"STU-001\",\n            \"school_id\": \"SCH-001\",\n            \"days_past_due\": 0,\n            \"country\": \"ES\",\n            \"amount\": 5000.0,\n        }\n\n    def test_eligible_asset(self) -> None:\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(self._base_raw())\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is True\n        assert reasons == []\n\n    def test_status_case_insensitive(self) -> None:\n        for status in (\"open\", \"Open\", \"OPEN\"):\n            raw = {**self._base_raw(), \"status\": status}\n            asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n            ok, _ = self.policy.check(asset)\n            assert ok is True, f\"Expected eligible for status={status!r}\"\n\n    def test_ineligible_wrong_status(self) -> None:\n        raw = {**self._base_raw(), \"status\": \"closed\"}\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is False\n        assert any(\"status\" in r for r in reasons)\n\n    def test_ineligible_is_eligible_false(self) -> None:\n        raw = {**self._base_raw(), \"is_eligible\": False}\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is False\n        assert any(\"is_eligible\" in r for r in reasons)\n\n    def test_ineligible_wrong_loan_status(self) -> None:\n        raw = {**self._base_raw(), \"loan_status\": \"delinquent\"}\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is False\n        assert any(\"loan_status\" in r for r in reasons)\n\n    def test_ineligible_null_interest_rate(self) -> None:\n        raw = {**self._base_raw(), \"interest_rate_percentage\": None}\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is False\n        assert any(\"interest_rate_percentage\" in r for r in reasons)\n\n    def test_multiple_failures_reported(self) -> None:\n        raw = {\n            **self._base_raw(),\n            \"status\": \"closed\",\n            \"is_eligible\": False,\n        }\n        asset = EducaMapper().map(raw)\n        ok, reasons = self.policy.check(asset)\n        assert ok is False\n        assert len(reasons) >= 2\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# EducaMapper\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass TestEducaMapper:\n    def setup_method(self) -> None:\n        self.mapper = EducaMapper()\n\n    def _valid_raw(self) -> dict:\n        return {\n            \"external_id\": \"EDU-001\",\n            \"status\": \"open\",\n            \"is_eligible\": True,\n            \"loan_status\": \"current\",\n            \"interest_rate_percentage\": 20.86,\n            \"outstanding_amount\": 4875.0,\n            \"disbursement_amount\": 6500.0,\n            \"repaid_amount\": 1625.0,\n            \"effective_date\": \"2024-06-25\",\n            \"reporting_date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n            \"student_id\": \"STU-10001\",\n            \"school_id\": \"SCH-001\",\n            \"days_past_due\": 0,\n            \"country\": \"ES\",\n            \"amount\": 6500.0,\n        }\n\n    def test_maps_valid_raw(self) -> None:\n        asset = self.mapper.map(self._valid_raw())\n        assert asset.external_id == \"EDU-001\"\n        assert asset.outstanding_amount == Decimal(\"4875.0\")\n        assert asset.interest_rate_percentage == Decimal(\"20.86\")\n        assert asset.is_eligible is True\n\n    def test_maps_null_interest_rate(self) -> None:\n        raw = {**self._valid_raw(), \"interest_rate_percentage\": None}\n        asset = self.mapper.map(raw)\n        assert asset.interest_rate_percentage is None\n\n    def test_raises_on_missing_external_id(self) -> None:\n        raw = self._valid_raw()\n        del raw[\"external_id\"]\n        with pytest.raises(InvalidPortfolioData):\n            self.mapper.map(raw)\n\n    def test_raises_on_missing_outstanding_amount(self) -> None:\n        raw = self._valid_raw()\n        del raw[\"outstanding_amount\"]\n        with pytest.raises(InvalidPortfolioData):\n            self.mapper.map(raw)\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# EducaCalculator\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass TestEducaCalculator:\n    def setup_method(self) -> None:\n        self.calc = EducaCalculator()\n\n    def _make_raw(\n        self,\n        external_id: str,\n        outstanding: str,\n        rate: str,\n        status: str = \"open\",\n        loan_status: str = \"current\",\n        is_eligible: bool = True,\n    ) -> dict:\n        return {\n            \"external_id\": external_id,\n            \"status\": status,\n            \"is_eligible\": is_eligible,\n            \"loan_status\": loan_status,\n            \"interest_rate_percentage\": float(rate),\n            \"outstanding_amount\": float(outstanding),\n            \"disbursement_amount\": float(outstanding),\n            \"repaid_amount\": 0.0,\n            \"effective_date\": \"2024-01-01\",\n            \"reporting_date\": \"2026-01-15\",\n            \"student_id\": \"STU-001\",\n            \"school_id\": \"SCH-001\",\n            \"days_past_due\": 0,\n            \"country\": \"ES\",\n            \"amount\": float(outstanding),\n        }\n\n    def test_weighted_average_calculation(self) -> None:\n        # Two assets: outstanding 4875 @ 20.86%, 10200 @ 18.54%\n        # Weighted sum = 4875*20.86 + 10200*18.54 = 101694.5 + 189108 = 290802.5\n        # Total outstanding = 15075\n        # Rate = 290802.5 / 15075 ≈ 19.29%\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"4875\", \"20.86\"),\n            self._make_raw(\"A2\", \"10200\", \"18.54\"),\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.effective_rate == Decimal(\"19.29\")\n\n    def test_excluded_assets_in_report(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"4875\", \"20.86\"),\n            self._make_raw(\"A2\", \"7100\", \"25.11\", loan_status=\"delinquent\"),\n            self._make_raw(\"A3\", \"3200\", \"19.50\", status=\"closed\"),\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert \"A1\" in report.included_assets\n        excluded_ids = [e.external_id for e in report.excluded_assets]\n        assert \"A2\" in excluded_ids\n        assert \"A3\" in excluded_ids\n\n    def test_summary_counts(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"4875\", \"20.86\"),\n            self._make_raw(\"A2\", \"7100\", \"25.11\", loan_status=\"delinquent\"),\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.total_assets == 2\n        assert len(report.included_assets) == 1\n        assert len(report.excluded_assets) == 1\n\n    def test_compliant_status_below_threshold(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"10000\", \"20.00\")]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n\n    def test_breach_status_at_threshold(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"10000\", \"22.00\")]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.BREACH\n\n    def test_breach_status_above_threshold(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"10000\", \"25.00\")]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.BREACH\n\n    def test_raises_when_no_eligible_assets(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"7100\", \"25.11\", loan_status=\"delinquent\"),\n        ]\n        with pytest.raises(CovenantCalculationError):\n            self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n\n    def test_threshold_stored_in_report(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"10000\", \"20.00\")]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.threshold == Decimal(\"22.00\")\n\n    def test_null_rate_excluded(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"A1\", \"4875\", \"20.86\"),\n            {\n                **self._make_raw(\"A2\", \"7000\", \"0\"),\n                \"interest_rate_percentage\": None,\n            },\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert \"A2\" in [e.external_id for e in report.excluded_assets]\n        assert \"A1\" in report.included_assets\n"}

}\n\n    def test_maps_valid_raw(self) -> None:\n        asset = self.mapper.map(self._valid_raw())\n        assert asset.external_id == \"PE-001\"\n        assert asset.outstanding_principal_amount     \"status\": status,\n            \"is_eligible\": is_eligible,\n            \"outstanding_principal_amount\": float(outstanding_principal),\n            \"total_principal_amount\": float(total_principal),\n            \"repaid_principal_amount\": 0.0,\n            \"total_fee_amount\": float(total_fee),\n            \"outstanding_fee_amount\": float(total_fee),\n   \"employer_name\": \"ACME Corp\",\n            \"employee_id\": \"EE-001\",\n            \"user_state\": \"WI\",\n            \"amount\": float(total_principal),\n        }\n\n    def test_fee_yield_calculation(self) -> None:\n        # Asset: principal=8500, fee=1.75, created=2025-06-15, due=2026-03-15\n        # tenor_days = 273 days\n        # fee_yield = (1.75/8500) * (365/273) = 0.000205882 * 1.336996... ≈ 0.002752...\n        # Only one asset so effective_rate = fee_yield * 100 ≈ 0.28%\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"PE-001\",\n                \"3400\",\n                \"8500\",\n                \"1.75\",\n                \"2025-06-15T09:00:00+00:00\",\n                \"2026-03-15\",\n            )\n        ]\n        report = test_compliant_below_threshold(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"PE-001\",\n                \"1000\",\n                \"1000\",\n = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-b\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n\n    def test_breach_above_threshold(self) -> None:\n        # fee_yield = (100/1000)*(365/365) = 10% > 3%\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"PE-001\",\n                \"1000\",\n                \"1000\",\n                \"100.0\",\n                \"2024-01-01T00:00:00+00:00\",\n                \"2024-12-31\",\n            )\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-b\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.BREACH\n\n    def test_excluded_defaulted_asset(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"PE-001\",\n                \"3400\",\n                \"8500\",\n                \"1.75\",\n                \"2025-06-15T09:00:00+00:00\",\n                \"2026-03-15\",\n            ),\n            self._make_raw(\n \"PE-001\",\n                \"7111\",\n                \"7111\",\n                \"2.92\",\n                \"2023-07-22T13:52:25+00:00\",\n                \"2025-07-28\",\n                status=\"defaulted\",\n            )\n        ]\n        with pytest.raises(CovenantCalculationError):\n            self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-b\", \"corr-001\")\n\n    def test_threshold_stored_in_report(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"PE-001\",\n                \"3400\",\n                \"8500\",\n                \"1.75\",\n                \"2025-06-15T09:00:00+00:00\",\n                \"2026-03-15\",\n            )\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-b\", \"corr-001\")\n return {\n            \"external_id\": \"NOM-001\",\n            \"status\": \"active\",\n            \"is_eligible\": True,\n            \"outstanding_amount\": 900.0,\n            \"fee_percentage\": 2.5,\n            \"fee_amount\": 45.0,\n            \"origination_date\": \"2024-05-31\",\n            \"maturity_date\": \"31/01/2025\",\n            \"net_monthly_salary\": test_annualized_fee_calculation(self) -> None:\n        # Asset: outstanding=900, fee_pct=2.5, origination=2024-05-31, maturity=31/01/2025\n        # repayment_months = 8 months\n        # annualized_fee = 2.5 * (12/8) = 3.75\n        # Effective rate = 3.75 (single asset)\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"900\", \"2.5\", \"2024-05-31\", \"31/01/2025\")\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.effective_rate == Decimal(\"3.75\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n\n    def test_weighted_average_two_assets(self) -> None:\n        # Asset1: outstanding=900, fee=2.5%, 8 months → annualized=3.75\n        # Asset2: outstanding=2500, fee=2.0%, origination=2024-06-27, maturity=31/01/2025\n        #   repayment_months = 7 months\n        #   annualized = 2.0 * (12/7) ≈ 3.4286\n        # Weighted = (900*3.75 + 2500*3.4286) / (900+2500)\n        #          = (3375 + 8571.43) / 3400 ≈ 3.51\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"900\", \"2.5\", \"2024-05-31\", \"31/01/2025\"),\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-002\", \"2500\", \"2.0\", \"2024-06-27\", \"31/01/2025\"),\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.effective_rate == Decimal(\"3.51\")\n\n    def test_compliant_below_threshold(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"900\", \"2.5\", \"2024-05-31\", \"31/01/2025\")\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n\n    def test_breach_above_threshold(self) -> None:\n        # fee=10%, 1 month tenure → annualized = 10*12 = 120% — well above 5%\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"1000\", \"10.0\", \"2024-12-31\", \"31/01/2025\")\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.status == CovenantStatus.BREACH\n\n    def test_excluded_written_off(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"900\", \"2.5\", \"2024-05-31\", \"31/01/2025\"),\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"NOM-002\",\n                \"4100\",\n                \"2.5\",\n                \"2024-06-21\",\n                \"31/08/2024\",\n                status=\"written_off\",\n                is_eligible=False,\n            ),\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert \"NOM-001\" in report.included_assets\n        assert \"NOM-002\" in [e.external_id for e in report.excluded_assets]\n\n    def test_raises_when_no_eligible_assets(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\n                \"NOM-001\",\n                \"4100\",\n                \"2.5\",\n                \"2024-06-21\",\n                \"31/08/2024\",\n                status=\"written_off\",\n                is_eligible=False,\n            )\n        ]\n        with pytest.raises(CovenantCalculationError):\n            self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n\n    def test_threshold_stored_in_report(self) -> None:\n        raw_assets = [\n            self._make_raw(\"NOM-001\", \"900\", \"2.5\", \"2024-05-31\", \"31/01/2025\")\n        ]\n        report = self.calc.calculate(raw_assets, \"facility-c\", \"corr-001\")\n        assert report.threshold == Decimal(\"5.00\")\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/domain/calculations/educa.py","content":"from datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom decimal import ROUND_HALF_UP, Decimal\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom app.domain.asset.educa import EducaAsset\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantCalculationError, InvalidPortfolioData\nfrom app.domain.facility.interfaces import (\n    EligibilityPolicy,\n    FacilityCalculator,\n    FacilityMapper,\n)\nfrom app.domain.asset.base import BaseAsset\n\n_THRESHOLD = Decimal(\"22.00\")\n_TWO_PLACES = Decimal(\"0.01\")\n\n\nclass EducaEligibilityPolicy(EligibilityPolicy):\n    \"\"\"\n    Eligibility rules for Facility A — Educa Capital I.\n\n    An asset is eligible when ALL hold:\n      - status is \"open\" (case-insensitive)\n      - is_eligible is True\n      - loan_status is \"current\"\n      - interest_rate_percentage is not null\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]:\n        educa = asset if isinstance(asset, EducaAsset) else None\n        if educa is None:\n            return False, [\"asset is not an EducaAsset\"]\n\n        reasons: list[str] = []\n        if educa.status.lower() != \"open\":\n            reasons.append(f\"status must be 'open', got '{educa.status}'\")\n        if not educa.is_eligible:\n            reasons.append(\"is_eligible is False\")\n        if educa.loan_status != \"current\":\n            reasons.append(f\"loan_status must be 'current', got '{educa.loan_status}'\")\n        if educa.interest_rate_percentage is None:\n            reasons.append(\"interest_rate_percentage is null\")\n        return len(reasons) == 0, reasons\n\n\nclass EducaMapper(FacilityMapper):\n    \"\"\"Maps raw Educa portfolio JSON to EducaAsset domain objects.\"\"\"\n\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> EducaAsset:  # type: ignore[override]\n        try:\n            return EducaAsset(\n                external_id=raw[\"external_id\"],\n                amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"amount\"])),\n                is_eligible=bool(raw[\"is_eligible\"]),\n                status=str(raw[\"status\"]),\n                loan_status=str(raw[\"loan_status\"]),\n                outstanding_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"outstanding_amount\"])),\n                interest_rate_percentage=(\n                    Decimal(str(raw[\"interest_rate_percentage\"]))\n                    if raw.get(\"interest_rate_percentage\") is not None\n                    else None\n                ),\n                effective_date=raw[\"effective_date\"],\n                reporting_date=raw[\"reporting_date\"],\n                student_id=str(raw[\"student_id\"]),\n                school_id=str(raw[\"school_id\"]),\n                disbursement_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"disbursement_amount\"])),\n                repaid_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"repaid_amount\"])),\n                days_past_due=int(raw[\"days_past_due\"]),\n                country=str(raw[\"country\"]),\n            )\n        except KeyError as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Missing required field: {e}\") from e\n        except Exception as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Invalid portfolio data: {e}\") from e\n\n\nclass EducaCalculator(FacilityCalculator):\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculates the Weighted Average Loan IRR for Facility A — Educa Capital I.\n\n    Formula: Σ(outstanding_amount_i × interest_rate_percentage_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n    Threshold: effective rate must be below 22.0%.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._mapper = EducaMapper()\n        self._policy = EducaEligibilityPolicy()\n\n    def calculate(\n        self,\n        raw_assets: list[dict],  # type: ignore[type-arg]\n        facility_id: str,\n        correlation_id: str,\n    ) -> CovenantReport:\n        included: list[str] = []\n        excluded: list[ExcludedAsset] = []\n        weighted_sum = Decimal(\"0\")\n        total_outstanding = Decimal(\"0\")\n\n        for raw in raw_assets:\n            asset = self._mapper.map(raw)\n            eligible, reasons = self._policy.check(asset)\n            if eligible:\n                included.append(asset.external_id)\n                weighted_sum += asset.outstanding_amount * asset.interest_rate_percentage  # type: ignore[operator]\n                total_outstanding += asset.outstanding_amount\n            else:\n                excluded.append(\n                    ExcludedAsset(external_id=asset.external_id, reasons=reasons)\n                )\n\n        if total_outstanding == Decimal(\"0\"):\n            raise CovenantCalculationError(\n                f\"No eligible assets found for facility '{facility_id}'\"\n            )\n\n        effective_rate = (weighted_sum / total_outstanding).quantize(\n            _TWO_PLACES, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP\n        )\n        status = (\n            CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n            if effective_rate < _THRESHOLD\n            else CovenantStatus.BREACH\n        )\n\n        return CovenantReport(\n            report_id=uuid4(),\n            facility_id=facility_id,\n            effective_rate=effective_rate,\n            threshold=_THRESHOLD,\n            status=status,\n            total_assets=len(raw_assets),\n            included_assets=included,\n            excluded_assets=excluded,\n            computed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n            correlation_id=correlation_id,\n        )\n"}
```

rules for Facility B — PayEarly US (Earned Wage Access).\n\n    An asset is eligible when ALL hold:\n      - status is \"performing\" (case-insensitive)\n      - is_eligible is True\n      - outstanding_principal_amount > 0\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]:\n        pe = asset if isinstance(asset, PayEarlyAsset) else None\n        if pe is reasons.append(\n                f\"outstanding_principal_amount must be > 0, got {pe.outstanding_principal_amount}\"\n            )\n        return len(reasons) == 0, reasons\n\n\nclass PayEarlyMapper(FacilityMapper):\n    \"\"\"Maps raw PayEarly portfolio JSON to PayEarlyAsset domain objects.\"\"\"\n\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> PayEarlyAsset:  # type: ignore[override]\n        try:\n            return PayEarlyAsset(\n                external_id=raw[\"external_id\"],\n                amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"amount\"])),\n                is_eligible=bool(raw[\"is_eligible\"]),\n                status=str(raw[\"status\"]),\n                outstanding_principal_amount=Decimal(\n repaid_principal_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"repaid_principal_amount\"])),\n                total_fee_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"total_fee_amount\"])),\n                outstanding_fee_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"outstanding_fee_amount\"])),\n                created_at=raw[\"created_at\"],\n                due_date=raw[\"due_date\"],\n                days_past_due=int(raw[\"days_past_due\"]),\n                receivable_currency=str(raw[\"receivable_currency\"]),\n                employer_id=str(raw[\"employer_id\"]),\n                employer_name=str(raw[\"employer_name\"]),\n                employee_id=str(raw[\"employee_id\"]),\n                user_state=str(raw[\"user_state\"]),\n            )\n        except KeyError as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Missing required field: {e}\") from e\n        except Exception as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Invalid portfolio data: {e}\") from e\n\n\nclass PayEarlyCalculator(FacilityCalculator):\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculates the Portfolio Fee Yield for Facility B — PayEarly US.\n\n    EWA products carry 0% interest; the effective rate is derived from the fee\n    structure relative to outstanding principal, annualized by loan tenor.\n\n    Formula per eligible asset:\n      tenor_days_i = (due_date - created_at.date()).days\n      fee_yield_i  = (total_fee_amount_i / total_principal_amount_i) × (365 / tenor_days_i)\n\n    Portfolio rate:\n      Effective Rate = Σ(outstanding_principal_i × fee_yield_i) / Σ(outstanding_principal_i)\n\n    Threshold: effective rate must be below 3.0%.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._mapper = PayEarlyMapper()\n        self._policy = CovenantReport:\n        included: list[str] = []\n        excluded: list[ExcludedAsset] = []\n        weighted_sum = Decimal(\"0\")\n        total_outstanding = Decimal(\"0\")\n\n        for raw in raw_assets:\n            asset = self._mapper.map(raw)\n            eligible, reasons = self._policy.check(asset)\n            if eligible:\n                tenor_days = Decimal(\n                    str((asset.due_date - asset.created_at.date()).days)\n                )\n                fee_yield = (asset.total_fee_amount / asset.total_principal_amount) * (\n                    _365 / tenor_days\n                )\n                # Convert to percentage\n                fee_yield_pct = fee_yield * Decimal(\"100\")\n                included.append(asset.external_id)\n                weighted_sum += asset.outstanding_principal_amount * fee_yield_pct\n                total_outstanding += asset.outstanding_principal_amount\n            else:\n                excluded.append(\n  correlation_id=correlation_id,\n        )\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/domain/calculations/nomina.py","content":"from datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom decimal import ROUND_HALF_UP, Decimal\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom app.domain.asset.base import BaseAsset\nfrom app.domain.asset.nomina import NominaAsset\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantCalculationError, InvalidPortfolioData\nfrom app.domain.facility.interfaces import (\n    EligibilityPolicy,\n    FacilityCalculator,\n    FacilityMapper,\n)\n\n_THRESHOLD = Decimal(\"5.00\")\n_TWO_PLACES = Decimal(\"0.01\")\n_12 = Decimal(\"12\")\n\n\ndef _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(date_str: str) -> \"datetime\":\n    \"\"\"Parse DD/MM/YYYY date format used by Nomina Express.\"\"\"\n    from datetime import date\n\n    day, month, year = date_str.split(\"/\")\n    return date(int(year), int(month), int(day))\n\n\ndef _repayment_months(origination_date: \"datetime\", maturity_str: str) -> Decimal:\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculate the number of whole calendar months between origination and maturity.\n    Uses ceiling to handle partial months (at least 1 month is assumed).\n    \"\"\"\n    from datetime import date\n\n    maturity = _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(maturity_str)\n    orig = origination_date if isinstance(origination_date, date) else origination_date\n\n    months = (maturity.year - orig.year) * 12 + (maturity.month - orig.month)  # type: ignore[union-attr]\n    if months < 1:\n        months = 1\n    return Decimal(str(months))\n\n\nclass NominaEligibilityPolicy(EligibilityPolicy):\n    \"\"\"\n    Eligibility rules for Facility C — Nomina Express I (Salary Advance).\n\n    An asset is eligible when ALL hold:\n      - status is \"active\" (case-insensitive)\n      - is_eligible is True\n      - outstanding_amount > 0\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]:\n        nom = asset if isinstance(asset, NominaAsset) else None\n        if nom is None:\n            return False, [\"asset is not a NominaAsset\"]\n\n        reasons: list[str] = []\n        if nom.status.lower() != \"active\":\n            reasons.append(f\"status must be 'active', got '{nom.status}'\")\n        if not nom.is_eligible:\n            reasons.append(\"is_eligible is False\")\n        if nom.outstanding_amount <= Decimal(\"0\"):\n            reasons.append(\n                f\"outstanding_amount must be > 0, got {nom.outstanding_amount}\"\n            )\n        return len(reasons) == 0, reasons\n\n\nclass NominaMapper(FacilityMapper):\n    \"\"\"Maps raw Nomina portfolio JSON to NominaAsset domain objects.\"\"\"\n\n    def map(self, raw: dict) -> NominaAsset:  # type: ignore[override]\n        try:\n            return NominaAsset(\n                external_id=raw[\"external_id\"],\n                amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"amount\"])),\n                is_eligible=bool(raw[\"is_eligible\"]),\n                status=str(raw[\"status\"]),\n                outstanding_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"outstanding_amount\"])),\n                fee_percentage=Decimal(str(raw[\"fee_percentage\"])),\n                fee_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"fee_amount\"])),\n                origination_date=raw[\"origination_date\"],\n                maturity_date=str(raw[\"maturity_date\"]),\n                net_monthly_salary=Decimal(str(raw[\"net_monthly_salary\"])),\n                advance_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"advance_amount\"])),\n                repaid_amount=Decimal(str(raw[\"repaid_amount\"])),\n                days_past_due=int(raw[\"days_past_due\"]),\n                employer_name=str(raw[\"employer_name\"]),\n                employer_tax_id=str(raw[\"employer_tax_id\"]),\n            )\n        except KeyError as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Missing required field: {e}\") from e\n        except Exception as e:\n            raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Invalid portfolio data: {e}\") from e\n\n\nclass NominaCalculator(FacilityCalculator):\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculates the Weighted Average Annualized Advance Fee for Facility C.\n\n    Formula per eligible asset:\n      repayment_months_i = calendar months between origination_date and maturity_date\n      annualized_fee_i   = fee_percentage_i × (12 / repayment_months_i)\n\n    Portfolio rate:\n      Effective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × annualized_fee_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n\n    Threshold: effective rate must be below 5.0%.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._mapper = NominaMapper()\n        self._policy = NominaEligibilityPolicy()\n\n    def calculate(\n        self,\n        raw_assets: list[dict],  # type: ignore[type-arg]\n        facility_id: str,\n        correlation_id: str,\n    ) -> CovenantReport:\n        included: list[str] = []\n        excluded: list[ExcludedAsset] = []\n        weighted_sum = Decimal(\"0\")\n        total_outstanding = Decimal(\"0\")\n\n        for raw in raw_assets:\n            asset = self._mapper.map(raw)\n            eligible, reasons = self._policy.check(asset)\n            if eligible:\n                months = _repayment_months(asset.origination_date, asset.maturity_date)\n                annualized_fee = asset.fee_percentage * (_12 / months)\n                included.append(asset.external_id)\n                weighted_sum += asset.outstanding_amount * annualized_fee\n                total_outstanding += asset.outstanding_amount\n            else:\n                excluded.append(\n                    ExcludedAsset(external_id=asset.external_id, reasons=reasons)\n                )\n\n        if total_outstanding == Decimal(\"0\"):\n            raise CovenantCalculationError(\n                f\"No eligible assets found for facility '{facility_id}'\"\n            )\n\n        effective_rate = (weighted_sum / total_outstanding).quantize(\n            _TWO_PLACES, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP\n        )\n        status = (\n            CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n            if effective_rate < _THRESHOLD\n            else CovenantStatus.BREACH\n        )\n\n        return CovenantReport(\n            report_id=uuid4(),\n            facility_id=facility_id,\n            effective_rate=effective_rate,\n            threshold=_THRESHOLD,\n            status=status,\n            total_assets=len(raw_assets),\n            included_assets=included,\n            excluded_assets=excluded,\n            computed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n            correlation_id=correlation_id,\n        )\n"}
```

import CalculateCovenantUseCase\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus\nfrom app.domain.errors import FacilityNotSupported\n\n\ndef _make_report() -> CovenantReport:\n    return CovenantReport(\n        report_id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        effective_rate=Decimal(\"19.43\"),\n        threshold=Decimal(\"22.00\"),\n        status=CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT,\n        total_assets=5,\n        included_assets=[\"A1\", \"A2\"],\n        excluded_assets=[],\n        computed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n        correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n    )\n\n\nclass TestCalculateCovenantUseCase:\n    def setup_method(self) -> None:\n        self.registry = MagicMock()\n        self.repository = MagicMock()\n        self.publisher = MagicMock()\n        self.use_case = CalculateCovenantUseCase(\n            registry=self.registry,\n            repository=self.repository,\n            publisher=self.publisher,\n        )\n\n    def test_execute_returns_report(self) -> None:\n        report = _make_report()\n        self.registry.get.return_value.calculate.return_value = report\n\n        command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n            facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n            assets=[{\"external_id\": \"A1\"}],\n            correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n        )\n        result = self.use_case.execute(command)\n\n        assert result is report\n\n    def test_execute_saves_report(self) -> None:\n        report = _make_report()\n        self.registry.get.return_value.calculate.return_value = report\n\n        command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n            facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n            assets=[],\n            correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n        )\n        self.use_case.execute(command)\n\n        self.repository.save.assert_called_once_with(report)\n\n    def test_execute_publishes_report(self) -> None:\n        report = _make_report()\n        self.registry.get.return_value.calculate.return_value = report\n\n        command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n            facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n            assets=[],\n            correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n        )\n        self.use_case.execute(command)\n\n        self.publisher.publish.assert_called_once_with(report)\n\n    def test_execute_propagates_facility_not_supported(self) -> None:\n        self.registry.get.side_effect = FacilityNotSupported(\"facility-x\")\n\n        command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n            facility_id=\"facility-x\",\n            assets=[],\n            correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n        )\n        with pytest.raises(FacilityNotSupported):\n            self.use_case.execute(command)\n\n    def test_execute_calls_calculator_with_correct_args(self) -> None:\n        report = _make_report()\n        calculator = self.registry.get.return_value\n        calculator.calculate.return_value = report\n\n        assets = [{\"external_id\": \"A1\"}, {\"external_id\": \"A2\"}]\n        command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n            facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n            assets=assets,\n            correlation_id=\"corr-xyz\",\n        )\n        self.use_case.execute(command)\n\n        calculator.calculate.assert_called_once_with(assets, \"facility-a\", \"corr-xyz\")\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/application/registry.py","content":"from app.domain.errors import FacilityNotSupported\nfrom app.domain.facility.interfaces import FacilityCalculator\n\n\nclass FacilityRegistry:\n    \"\"\"Maps facility IDs to their FacilityCalculator implementations.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._calculators: dict[str, FacilityCalculator] = {}\n\n    def register(self, facility_id: str, calculator: FacilityCalculator) -> None:\n        self._calculators[facility_id] = calculator\n\n    def get(self, facility_id: str) -> FacilityCalculator:\n        try:\n            return self._calculators[facility_id]\n        except KeyError:\n            raise FacilityNotSupported(\n                f\"No calculator registered for facility '{facility_id}'\"\n            )\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/application/use_cases/calculate_covenant.py","content":"from app.application.commands.calculate_covenant import CalculateCovenantCommand\nfrom app.application.registry import FacilityRegistry\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport\nfrom app.domain.covenant.repository import CovenantReportRepository\nfrom app.domain.publishers.interface import Publisher\n\n\nclass CalculateCovenantUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: Ingest raw portfolio data, compute the facility's effective\n    interest rate, produce an auditable CovenantReport, and publish it immutably.\n\n    Assumptions:\n      - facility_id is registered in the FacilityRegistry.\n      - Raw asset dicts are validated by the facility's FacilityMapper.\n      - Each execution creates a new, independent report (append-only).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        registry: FacilityRegistry,\n        repository: CovenantReportRepository,\n        publisher: Publisher,\n    ) -> None:\n        self._registry = registry\n        self._repository = repository\n        self._publisher = publisher\n\n    def execute(self, command: CalculateCovenantCommand) -> CovenantReport:\n        calculator = self._registry.get(command.facility_id)\n        report = calculator.calculate(\n            command.assets, command.facility_id, command.correlation_id\n        )\n        self._repository.save(report)\n        self._publisher.publish(report)\n        return report\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/application/use_cases/get_covenant_report.py","content":"from typing import Optional\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom app.application.queries.get_report import GetCovenantReportQuery\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport\nfrom app.domain.covenant.repository import CovenantReportRepository\n\n\nclass GetCovenantReportUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: Retrieve a previously published covenant report by ID.\n\n    Assumptions:\n      - report_id is a valid UUID that was returned from a previous calculation.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, repository: CovenantReportRepository) -> None:\n        self._repository = repository\n\n    def execute(self, query: GetCovenantReportQuery) -> Optional[CovenantReport]:\n        return self._repository.find_by_id(query.report_id)\n\n\nclass ListCovenantReportsUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: List all published covenant reports for a facility.\n\n    Assumptions:\n      - facility_id corresponds to a known facility.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, repository: CovenantReportRepository) -> None:\n        self._repository = repository\n\n    def execute(self, facility_id: str) -> list[CovenantReport]:\n        return self._repository.find_by_facility(facility_id)\n"}
```
