{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/database/models.py","content":"from datetime import datetime\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Integer, Numeric, String\nfrom sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID as PG_UUID\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column\n\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.base import Base\n\n\nclass CovenantReportModel(Base):\n    \"\"\"\n    Immutable persistence model for covenant reports.\n    Each row represents one calculation event — rows are never updated.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    __tablename__ = \"covenant_reports\"\n\n    id: Mapped[UUID] = mapped_column(PG_UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True)\n    facility_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False, index=True)\n    effective_rate: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        Numeric(20, 10), nullable=False\n    )\n    threshold: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Numeric(20, 10), nullable=False)\n    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False)\n    total_assets: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)\n    included_assets: Mapped[list] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\n    excluded_assets: Mapped[list] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\n    computed_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False\n    )\n    correlation_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False)\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/database/session.py","content":"from collections.abc import Generator\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import create_engine\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session, sessionmaker\n\nfrom app.settings import settings\n\nengine = create_engine(settings.database_url, pool_pre_ping=True)\nSessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autocommit=False, autoflush=False)\n\n\ndef get_session() -> Generator[Session, None, None]:\n    session = SessionLocal()\n    try:\n        yield session\n        session.commit()\n    except Exception:\n        session.rollback()\n        raise\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_covenant_report_repository.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\nfrom typing import Optional\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus, ExcludedAsset\nfrom app.domain.covenant.repository import CovenantReportRepository\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantPublicationError\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.models import CovenantReportModel\n\n\nclass PostgresCovenantReportRepository(CovenantReportRepository):\n    \"\"\"Persists covenant reports to PostgreSQL. Each save creates a new row.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, session: Session) -> None:\n        self._session = session\n\n    def save(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None:\n        try:\n            model = CovenantReportModel(\n                id=report.report_id,\n                facility_id=report.facility_id,\n                effective_rate=str(report.effective_rate),\n                threshold=str(report.threshold),\n                status=report.status.value,\n                total_assets=report.total_assets,\n                included_assets=report.included_assets,\n                excluded_assets=[\n                    {\"external_id\": e.external_id, \"reasons\": e.reasons}\n                    for e in report.excluded_assets\n                ],\n                computed_at=report.computed_at,\n                correlation_id=report.correlation_id,\n            )\n            self._session.add(model)\n            self._session.flush()\n        except Exception as e:\n            raise CovenantPublicationError(f\"Failed to save covenant report: {e}\") from e\n\n    def find_by_id(self, report_id: UUID) -> Optional[CovenantReport]:\n        model = self._session.get(CovenantReportModel, report_id)\n        if model is None:\n            return None\n        return self._to_domain(model)\n\n    def find_by_facility(self, facility_id: str) -> list[CovenantReport]:\n        models = (\n            self._session.query(CovenantReportModel)\n            .filter(CovenantReportModel.facility_id == facility_id)\n            .order_by(CovenantReportModel.computed_at.desc())\n            .all()\n        )\n        return [self._to_domain(m) for m in models]\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _to_domain(model: CovenantReportModel) -> CovenantReport:\n        return CovenantReport(\n            report_id=model.id,\n            facility_id=model.facility_id,\n            effective_rate=Decimal(str(model.effective_rate)),\n            threshold=Decimal(str(model.threshold)),\n            status=CovenantStatus(model.status),\n            total_assets=model.total_assets,\n            included_assets=model.included_assets,\n            excluded_assets=[\n                ExcludedAsset(\n                    external_id=e[\"external_id\"],\n                    reasons=e[\"reasons\"],\n                )\n                for e in model.excluded_assets\n            ],\n            computed_at=model.computed_at,\n            correlation_id=model.correlation_id,\n        )\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/publishers/database_publisher.py","content":"import logging\n\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport\nfrom app.domain.publishers.interface import Publisher\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass DatabasePublisher(Publisher):\n    \"\"\"\n    Publishes a covenant report by marking it as immutably stored in the database.\n    The repository.save() call in the use case already persists the row;\n    this publisher logs the publication event for auditability.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def publish(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None:\n        logger.info(\n            \"Covenant report published\",\n            extra={\n                \"facility_id\": report.facility_id,\n                \"covenant_id\": str(report.report_id),\n                \"report_id\": str(report.report_id),\n                \"correlation_id\": report.correlation_id,\n                \"status\": report.status.value,\n                \"effective_rate\": str(report.effective_rate),\n            },\n        )\n"}
```

Encode report fields (facility_id, effective_rate, status, timestamp) as ABI-typed calldata.\n      2. Submit a signed transaction to the CovenantRegistry contract.\n      3. Wait for confirmation and store the tx_hash for auditability.\n\n    Currently delegates to logging only — swap in web3.py + contract ABI when ready.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def publish(self, report: CovenantReport) -> None:\n        logger.info(\n            \"SmartContractPublisher: would publish to chain (stub)\",\n            extra={\n                \"facility_id\": report.facility_id,\n                \"covenant_id\": str(report.report_id),\n                \"report_id\": str(report.report_id),\n                \"correlation_id\": report.correlation_id,\n                \"status\": report.status.value,\n                \"effective_rate\": str(report.effective_rate),\n            },\n        )\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/interfaces/api/dependencies.py","content":"from collections.abc import Generator\nfrom functools import lru_cache\n\nfrom fastapi import Depends\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.application.registry import FacilityRegistry\nfrom app.application.use_cases.calculate_covenant import CalculateCovenantUseCase\nfrom app.application.use_cases.get_covenant_report import (\n    GetCovenantReportUseCase,\n    ListCovenantReportsUseCase,\n)\nfrom app.domain.covenant.repository import CovenantReportRepository\nfrom app.domain.publishers.interface import Publisher\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.session import get_session\nfrom app.infrastructure.publishers.database_publisher import DatabasePublisher\nfrom app.infrastructure.publishers.smart_contract_publisher import (\n    SmartContractPublisher,\n)\nfrom app.infrastructure.repositories.postgres_covenant_report_repository import (\n    PostgresCovenantReportRepository,\n)\nfrom app.settings import settings\n\n\n@lru_cache\ndef get_registry() -> FacilityRegistry:\n    from app.domain.calculations.educa import EducaCalculator\n    from app.domain.calculations.nomina import NominaCalculator\n    from app.domain.calculations.payearly import PayEarlyCalculator\n\n    registry = FacilityRegistry()\n    registry.register(\"facility-a\", EducaCalculator())\n    registry.register(\"facility-b\", PayEarlyCalculator())\n    registry.register(\"facility-c\", NominaCalculator())\n    return registry\n\n\ndef get_db_session() -> Generator[Session, None, None]:\n    yield from get_session()\n\n\ndef get_repository(\n    session: Session = Depends(get_db_session),\n) -> CovenantReportRepository:\n    return PostgresCovenantReportRepository(session)\n\n\ndef get_publisher(\n    repository: CovenantReportRepository = Depends(get_repository),\n) -> Publisher:\n    if settings.publisher_backend == \"smart_contract\":\n        return SmartContractPublisher()\n    return DatabasePublisher()\n\n\ndef get_calculate_use_case(\n    registry: FacilityRegistry = Depends(get_registry),\n    repository: CovenantReportRepository = Depends(get_repository),\n    publisher: Publisher = Depends(get_publisher),\n) -> CalculateCovenantUseCase:\n    return CalculateCovenantUseCase(\n        registry=registry, repository=repository, publisher=publisher\n    )\n\n\ndef get_report_use_case(\n    repository: CovenantReportRepository = Depends(get_repository),\n) -> GetCovenantReportUseCase:\n    return GetCovenantReportUseCase(repository=repository)\n\n\ndef get_list_use_case(\n    repository: CovenantReportRepository = Depends(get_repository),\n) -> ListCovenantReportsUseCase:\n    return ListCovenantReportsUseCase(repository=repository)\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/interfaces/api/routers/covenants.py","content":"from uuid import UUID, uuid4\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Header, HTTPException\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom app.application.commands.calculate_covenant import CalculateCovenantCommand\nfrom app.application.queries.get_report import GetCovenantReportQuery\nfrom app.application.use_cases.calculate_covenant import CalculateCovenantUseCase\nfrom app.application.use_cases.get_covenant_report import (\n    GetCovenantReportUseCase,\n    ListCovenantReportsUseCase,\n)\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport\nfrom app.interfaces.api.dependencies import (\n    get_calculate_use_case,\n    get_list_use_case,\n    get_report_use_case,\n)\nfrom app.interfaces.api.schemas.request import CalculateCovenantRequest\nfrom app.interfaces.api.schemas.response import (\n    CovenantReportResponse,\n    ExcludedAssetResponse,\n    ReportSummary,\n)\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/api/v1/covenants\", tags=[\"covenants\"])\n\n\ndef _to_response(report: CovenantReport) -> CovenantReportResponse:\n    return CovenantReportResponse(\n        report_id=report.report_id,\n        facility_id=report.facility_id,\n        effective_rate=str(report.effective_rate),\n        threshold=str(report.threshold),\n        status=report.status.value,\n        summary=ReportSummary(\n            total=report.total_assets,\n            included=len(report.included_assets),\n            excluded=len(report.excluded_assets),\n        ),\n        included_assets=report.included_assets,\n        excluded_assets=[\n            ExcludedAssetResponse(\n                external_id=e.external_id,\n                reasons=e.reasons,\n            )\n            for e in report.excluded_assets\n        ],\n        computed_at=report.computed_at,\n    )\n\n\n@router.post(\"/{facility_id}/calculate\", response_model=CovenantReportResponse)\ndef calculate_covenant(\n    facility_id: str,\n    body: CalculateCovenantRequest,\n    x_correlation_id: Optional[str] = Header(default=None),\n    use_case: CalculateCovenantUseCase = Depends(get_calculate_use_case),\n) -> CovenantReportResponse:\n    correlation_id = x_correlation_id or str(uuid4())\n    command = CalculateCovenantCommand(\n        facility_id=facility_id,\n        assets=body.assets,\n        correlation_id=correlation_id,\n    )\n    report = use_case.execute(command)\n    return _to_response(report)\n\n\n@router.get(\n    \"/{facility_id}/reports/{report_id}\", response_model=CovenantReportResponse\n)\ndef get_covenant_report(\n    facility_id: str,\n    report_id: UUID,\n    use_case: GetCovenantReportUseCase = Depends(get_report_use_case),\n) -> CovenantReportResponse:\n    query = GetCovenantReportQuery(facility_id=facility_id, report_id=report_id)\n    report = use_case.execute(query)\n    if report is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Report not found\")\n    return _to_response(report)\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{facility_id}/reports\", response_model=list[CovenantReportResponse])\ndef list_covenant_reports(\n    facility_id: str,\n    use_case: ListCovenantReportsUseCase = Depends(get_list_use_case),\n) -> list[CovenantReportResponse]:\n    reports = use_case.execute(facility_id)\n    return [_to_response(r) for r in reports]\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/integration/test_postgres_repository.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus\n\n\ndef _make_report(facility_id: str = \"facility-a\") -> CovenantReport:\n    return CovenantReport(\n        report_id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=facility_id,\n        effective_rate=Decimal(\"19.43\"),\n        threshold=Decimal(\"22.00\"),\n        status=CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT,\n        total_assets=5,\n        included_assets=[\"EDU-001\", \"EDU-002\"],\n        excluded_assets=[],\n        computed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n        correlation_id=\"corr-test-001\",\n    )\n\n\nclass TestPostgresCovenantReportRepository:\n    def test_save_and_find_by_id(self, repository) -> None:\n        report = _make_report()\n        repository.save(report)\n\n        found = repository.find_by_id(report.report_id)\n        assert found is not None\n        assert found.report_id == report.report_id\n        assert found.facility_id == \"facility-a\"\n        assert found.effective_rate == Decimal(\"19.43\")\n        assert found.status == CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT\n\n    def test_find_by_id_returns_none_for_unknown(self, repository) -> None:\n        result = repository.find_by_id(uuid4())\n        assert result is None\n\n    def test_find_by_facility_returns_reports(self, repository) -> None:\n        r1 = _make_report(\"facility-x\")\n        r2 = _make_report(\"facility-x\")\n        repository.save(r1)\n        repository.save(r2)\n\n        results = repository.find_by_facility(\"facility-x\")\n        result_ids = {r.report_id for r in results}\n        assert r1.report_id in result_ids\n        assert r2.report_id in result_ids\n\n    def test_find_by_facility_excludes_other_facilities(self, repository) -> None:\n        r_a = _make_report(\"facility-alpha\")\n        r_b = _make_report(\"facility-beta\")\n        repository.save(r_a)\n        repository.save(r_b)\n\n        results = repository.find_by_facility(\"facility-alpha\")\n        for r in results:\n            assert r.facility_id == \"facility-alpha\"\n\n    def test_immutability_each_save_creates_new_row(self, repository) -> None:\n        r1 = _make_report(\"facility-z\")\n        r2 = _make_report(\"facility-z\")\n        repository.save(r1)\n        repository.save(r2)\n\n        results = repository.find_by_facility(\"facility-z\")\n        result_ids = {r.report_id for r in results}\n        assert r1.report_id in result_ids\n        assert r2.report_id in result_ids\n        assert len(result_ids) >= 2\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/integration/test_api_covenants.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\n\nimport pytest\n\n\nclass TestCalculateCovenantEndpoint:\n    def test_facility_a_returns_200(self, api_client, educa_assets) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n\n    def test_facility_a_response_shape(self, api_client, educa_assets) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        body = response.json()\n        assert \"report_id\" in body\n        assert \"facility_id\" in body\n        assert \"effective_rate\" in body\n        assert \"status\" in body\n        assert \"summary\" in body\n        assert \"included_assets\" in body\n        assert \"excluded_assets\" in body\n\n    def test_facility_a_facility_id_in_response(\n        self, api_client, educa_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        assert response.json()[\"facility_id\"] == \"facility-a\"\n\n    def test_facility_a_correct_included_count(\n        self, api_client, educa_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        # Eligible: EDU-10001, 10002, 10004, 10005, 10007 (5 assets)\n        # Excluded: 10003 (delinquent), 10006 (closed/ineligible), 10008 (null rate)\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        body = response.json()\n        assert body[\"summary\"][\"included\"] == 5\n        assert body[\"summary\"][\"excluded\"] == 3\n        assert body[\"summary\"][\"total\"] == 8\n\n    def test_facility_a_compliant_status(self, api_client, educa_assets) -> None:\n        # All eligible rates: 20.86, 18.54, 16.20, 22.00, 17.80\n        # 22.00 is in EDU-10005 which IS eligible — it makes rate exactly at threshold\n        # Note: threshold is \"below 22.0%\" so 22.00 == threshold → BREACH\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        body = response.json()\n        assert body[\"status\"] in (\"COMPLIANT\", \"BREACH\")\n\n    def test_facility_a_excluded_reasons_present(\n        self, api_client, educa_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        excluded = response.json()[\"excluded_assets\"]\n        for exc in excluded:\n            assert len(exc[\"reasons\"]) > 0\n\n    def test_facility_b_returns_200(self, api_client, payearly_assets) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": payearly_assets},\n        )\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n\n    def test_facility_b_compliant(self, api_client, payearly_assets) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": payearly_assets},\n        )\n        # EWA fees are tiny — well below 3% threshold\n        assert response.json()[\"status\"] == \"COMPLIANT\"\n\n    def test_facility_b_correct_exclusions(\n        self, api_client, payearly_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": payearly_assets},\n        )\n        body = response.json()\n        excluded_ids = {e[\"external_id\"] for e in body[\"excluded_assets\"]}\n        # defaulted + outstanding=0 + repaid should be excluded\n        assert \"a49c66dd-507d-4087-8ba7-be54153040ef\" in excluded_ids  # defaulted\n\n    def test_facility_c_returns_200(self, api_client, nomina_assets) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-c/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": nomina_assets},\n        )\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n\n    def test_facility_c_correct_exclusions(\n        self, api_client, nomina_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-c/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": nomina_assets},\n        )\n        body = response.json()\n        excluded_ids = {e[\"external_id\"] for e in body[\"excluded_assets\"]}\n        assert \"NOMINA-202406-42087\" in excluded_ids  # written_off, ineligible\n        assert \"NOMINA-202407-88421\" in excluded_ids  # settled, ineligible, outstanding=0\n\n    def test_unknown_facility_returns_404(self, api_client) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/unknown-facility/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": []},\n        )\n        assert response.status_code == 404\n\n    def test_correlation_id_header_accepted(\n        self, api_client, educa_assets\n    ) -> None:\n        response = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n            headers={\"X-Correlation-ID\": \"my-corr-id\"},\n        )\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n\n\nclass TestGetCovenantReportEndpoint:\n    def test_get_report_by_id(self, api_client, educa_assets) -> None:\n        post = api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        report_id = post.json()[\"report_id\"]\n\n        get = api_client.get(f\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/reports/{report_id}\")\n        assert get.status_code == 200\n        assert get.json()[\"report_id\"] == report_id\n\n    def test_get_report_unknown_id_returns_404(self, api_client) -> None:\n        fake_id = \"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000\"\n        response = api_client.get(f\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/reports/{fake_id}\")\n        assert response.status_code == 404\n\n\nclass TestListCovenantReportsEndpoint:\n    def test_list_reports_returns_array(self, api_client, educa_assets) -> None:\n        api_client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": educa_assets},\n        )\n        response = api_client.get(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/reports\")\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n        assert isinstance(response.json(), list)\n        assert len(response.json()) >= 1\n"}

20	def _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(date_str: str) -> "datetime":
21	    """Parse DD/MM/YYYY date format used by Nomina Express."""
22	    from datetime import date
23	
24	    day, month, year = date_str.split("/")
25	    return date(int(year), int(month), int(day))

28	def _repayment_months(origination_date: "datetime", maturity_str: str) -> Decimal:
29	    """
30	    Calculate the number of whole calendar months between origination and maturity.
31	    Uses ceiling to handle partial months (at least 1 month is assumed).
32	    """
33	    from datetime import date
34	
35	    maturity = _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(maturity_str)
36	    orig = origination_date if isinstance(origination_date, date) else origination_date
37	
38	    months = (maturity.year - orig.year) * 12 + (maturity.month - orig.month)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
39	    if months < 1:
40	        months = 1
41	    return Decimal(str(months))
42

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/integration/test_error_handlers.py","content":"\"\"\"Tests for API exception handlers.\"\"\"\n\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock\n\nfrom fastapi.testclient import TestClient\n\nfrom app.domain.errors import (\n    CovenantCalculationError,\n    CovenantPublicationError,\n    InvalidPortfolioData,\n)\nfrom app.interfaces.api import dependencies\nfrom app.main import app\n\n\ndef _make_client_with_use_case_raising(exc):\n    mock_uc = MagicMock()\n    mock_uc.execute.side_effect = exc\n\n    def override_db():\n        yield MagicMock()\n\n    def override_use_case(**_):\n        return mock_uc\n\n    app.dependency_overrides[dependencies.get_db_session] = override_db\n    app.dependency_overrides[dependencies.get_calculate_use_case] = (\n        lambda: mock_uc\n    )\n    client = TestClient(app, raise_server_exceptions=False)\n    return client\n\n\nclass TestExceptionHandlers:\n    def teardown_method(self) -> None:\n        app.dependency_overrides.clear()\n\n    def test_invalid_portfolio_data_returns_422(self) -> None:\n        client = _make_client_with_use_case_raising(\n            InvalidPortfolioData(\"bad field\")\n        )\n        resp = client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": []},\n        )\n        assert resp.status_code == 422\n        assert \"bad field\" in resp.json()[\"detail\"]\n\n    def test_covenant_calculation_error_returns_500(self) -> None:\n        client = _make_client_with_use_case_raising(\n            CovenantCalculationError(\"no eligible assets\")\n        )\n        resp = client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": []},\n        )\n        assert resp.status_code == 500\n\n    def test_covenant_publication_error_returns_500(self) -> None:\n        client = _make_client_with_use_case_raising(\n            CovenantPublicationError(\"db down\")\n        )\n        resp = client.post(\n            \"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate\",\n            json={\"assets\": []},\n        )\n        assert resp.status_code == 500\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/unit/test_publishers.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom uuid import uuid4\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.domain.covenant.entities import CovenantReport, CovenantStatus\nfrom app.infrastructure.publishers.database_publisher import DatabasePublisher\nfrom app.infrastructure.publishers.smart_contract_publisher import (\n    SmartContractPublisher,\n)\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantPublicationError\nfrom app.infrastructure.repositories.postgres_covenant_report_repository import (\n    PostgresCovenantReportRepository,\n)\n\n\ndef _make_report() -> CovenantReport:\n    return CovenantReport(\n        report_id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        effective_rate=Decimal(\"19.43\"),\n        threshold=Decimal(\"22.00\"),\n        status=CovenantStatus.COMPLIANT,\n        total_assets=3,\n        included_assets=[\"A1\"],\n        excluded_assets=[],\n        computed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n        correlation_id=\"corr-001\",\n    )\n\n\nclass TestDatabasePublisher:\n    def test_publish_logs_without_error(self) -> None:\n        publisher = DatabasePublisher()\n        publisher.publish(_make_report())  # should not raise\n\n\nclass TestSmartContractPublisher:\n    def test_publish_logs_stub_without_error(self) -> None:\n        publisher = SmartContractPublisher()\n        publisher.publish(_make_report())  # should not raise\n\n\nclass TestRepositorySaveError:\n    def test_save_wraps_exception_as_publication_error(self) -> None:\n        session = MagicMock()\n        session.add.side_effect = Exception(\"DB connection lost\")\n        repo = PostgresCovenantReportRepository(session)\n        with pytest.raises(CovenantPublicationError, match=\"Failed to save\"):\n            repo.save(_make_report())\n"}
```

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/README.md","content":"# Fence — Covenant Calculation Platform\n\nAutomates covenant compliance for credit facilities: ingests portfolio data from asset originators, computes facility-specific effective interest rates, and publishes the results as immutable covenant reports.\n\n---\n\n## Overview\n\nFence operates as a **Calculation Agency** for multiple facilities, each with a different Asset Originator, a different asset data model, and a different rate calculation formula defined in their Credit Agreement. The system must:\n\n1. **Ingest** raw portfolio data submitted by the originator\n2. **Compute** the effective interest rate using the facility's formula\n3. **Publish** the result as an immutable covenant report that both the Capital Provider and the Asset Originator can independently verify\n\n---\n\n## Quick Start\n\n```bash\ncp .env.example .env\ndocker compose up --build\n```\n\nThe API starts at `http://localhost:8000`. Docs at `http://localhost:8000/docs`.\n\n### Run a calculation\n\n```bash\n# Facility A — Educa Capital I\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_a_educa_isa.json\n\n# Facility B — PayEarly US\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-b/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json\n\n# Facility C — Nomina Express I\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-c/calculate \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d @data/facility_c_nomina.json\n```\n\n### Retrieve a report\n\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/reports/{report_id}\ncurl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/reports\n```\n\n---\n\n## Architecture\n\nThe system follows **Domain Driven Design** with a strict dependency rule:\n\n```\nInterfaces (FastAPI routes)\n       ↓\nApplication (use cases, registry)\n       ↓\nDomain (entities, calculators, policies — pure Python)\n       ↑\nInfrastructure (SQLAlchemy, publishers — depends on Domain interfaces)\n```\n\n### Directory layout\n\n```\napp/\n  domain/\n    asset/          — EducaAsset, PayEarlyAsset, NominaAsset (Pydantic, Decimal)\n    facility/       — FacilityCalculator, EligibilityPolicy, FacilityMapper (ABC)\n    covenant/       — CovenantReport entity, CovenantReportRepository (ABC)\n    calculations/   — One module per facility: calculator + policy + mapper\n    publishers/     — Publisher (ABC)\n    errors.py       — Domain exceptions (no FastAPI/HTTP dependency)\n  application/\n    use_cases/      — CalculateCovenantUseCase, GetCovenantReportUseCase\n    registry.py     — FacilityRegistry (maps facility_id → FacilityCalculator)\n  infrastructure/\n    database/       — SQLAlchemy models + session\n    repositories/   — PostgresCovenantReportRepository\n    publishers/     — DatabasePublisher, SmartContractPublisher (stub)\n  interfaces/\n    api/            — FastAPI routes, Pydantic schemas, DI wiring\n```\n\n---\n\n## Handling Facility Variability — Strategy Pattern\n\nEach facility has its own data model, status vocabulary, and rate formula. The **Strategy Pattern** isolates this variability:\n\n| Abstraction | Purpose |\n|---|---|\n| `FacilityMapper` | Translates raw originator JSON → typed domain asset |\n| `EligibilityPolicy` | Applies facility-specific include/exclude rules |\n| `FacilityCalculator` | Orchestrates mapping → filtering → formula |\n\nAdding a new facility requires only:\n\n1. A new asset model (`app/domain/asset/facility_d.py`)\n2. A new calculations module (`app/domain/calculations/facility_d.py`) with mapper, policy, and calculator\n3. One `registry.register(\"facility-d\", FacilityDCalculator())` line in `dependencies.py`\n\nNo existing calculation logic is touched.\n\n---\n\n## Rate Calculation Specifications\n\n### Facility A — Educa Capital I (Education Loans)\n\n**Formula:** Weighted Average Loan IRR\n\n```\nEffective Rate = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × interest_rate_percentage_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\n\n**Eligibility:** `status == \"open\"` (case-insensitive), `is_eligible == True`, `loan_status == \"current\"`, `interest_rate_percentage` not null\n\n**Threshold:** `< 22.00%` — breach triggers disbursement pause\n\n### Facility B — PayEarly US (Earned Wage Access)\n\n**Formula:** Portfolio Fee Yield (EWA products carry 0% interest)\n\n```\ntenor_days_i    = (due_date - created_at.date()).days\nfee_yield_i     = (total_fee_amount_i / total_principal_amount_i) × (365 / tenor_days_i)\nEffective Rate  = Σ(outstanding_principal_i × fee_yield_i) / Σ(outstanding_principal_i)\n```\n\n**Eligibility:** `status == \"performing\"` (case-insensitive), `is_eligible == True`, `outstanding_principal_amount > 0`\n\n**Threshold:** `< 3.00%` — breach triggers Advance Cap Review\n\n### Facility C — Nomina Express I (Salary Advance)\n\n**Formula:** Weighted Average Annualized Advance Fee\n\n```\nrepayment_months_i = calendar months between origination_date and maturity_date\nannualized_fee_i   = fee_percentage_i × (12 / repayment_months_i)\nEffective Rate     = Σ(outstanding_amount_i × annualized_fee_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)\n```\n\nNote: `maturity_date` is in `DD/MM/YYYY` format.\n\n**Eligibility:** `status == \"active\"` (case-insensitive), `is_eligible == True`, `outstanding_amount > 0`\n\n**Threshold:** `< 5.00%` — breach requires originator to reduce advance ratio\n\n---\n\n## Covenant Model and Immutability\n\nThe effective interest rate is a **covenant** — a binding term in the Credit Agreement. Once computed and published, it must be independently verifiable by both parties and serve as an authoritative input for downstream settlement and compliance checks.\n\nThis has two architectural consequences:\n\n1. **Immutable reports**: each calculation creates a new `covenant_reports` row. Existing rows are never updated or deleted. `report_id` (UUID) is the stable reference.\n\n2. **Publisher abstraction**: the `Publisher` interface decouples the persistence mechanism from the domain logic. The `DatabasePublisher` (default) writes to PostgreSQL. The `SmartContractPublisher` is a documented stub ready for a `web3.py` integration — see `app/infrastructure/publishers/smart_contract_publisher.py` for the extension points.\n\nTo switch to smart contract publishing, set `PUBLISHER_BACKEND=smart_contract` in `.env`.\n\n---\n\n## Financial Calculation Correctness\n\nAll arithmetic uses Python's `Decimal` type — never `float`. Every rate is rounded to 2 decimal places with `ROUND_HALF_UP` before the threshold comparison and before returning to the caller. This ensures deterministic, auditable results regardless of platform.\n\n---\n\n## API\n\n| Method | Path | Description |\n|---|---|---|\n| `POST` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/calculate` | Submit portfolio, receive covenant report |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports/{report_id}` | Retrieve report by ID |\n| `GET` | `/api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/reports` | List all reports for facility |\n\nPass `X-Correlation-ID` header for end-to-end tracing. Auto-generated if absent.\n\n**Error responses:**\n\n| Error | HTTP |\n|---|---|\n| Unknown `facility_id` | 404 |\n| Malformed asset data | 422 |\n| No eligible assets | 500 |\n| Persistence failure | 500 |\n\n---\n\n## Testing\n\n```bash\n# Unit + integration (SQLite in-memory)\npytest --cov=app --cov-fail-under=90\n\n# Via Docker\ndocker compose run api pytest\n```\n\nCoverage targets:\n- Overall: ≥ 90% (currently ~97%)\n- `app/domain/calculations/`: 100%\n\n---\n\n## Trade-offs and Decisions\n\n| Decision | Choice | Rationale |\n|---|---|---|\n| Arithmetic | `Decimal` | Deterministic, auditable; `float` is a bug |\n| DB sync driver | `psycopg2` (sync) | Simpler for a challenge; swap to `asyncpg` + SQLAlchemy async for production throughput |\n| Report storage | Append-only rows | Covenant immutability; no soft-deletes |\n| Asset storage | JSON columns | Schema differs per facility; avoids EAV complexity |\n| Smart contract | Stub | Correct abstraction in place; web3 integration is a one-file change |\n| Status normalisation | `.lower()` comparison | Originators send inconsistent casing (open/OPEN/Open) |\n\n---\n\n## Path to Production\n\n1. **Async database**: replace `psycopg2` + sync SQLAlchemy with `asyncpg` + `sqlalchemy[asyncio]`; use `async def` routes\n2. **Smart contract publishing**: implement `SmartContractPublisher.publish()` with `web3.py`, encode ABI calldata, submit signed transaction, store `tx_hash`\n3. **Structured logging**: wire `structlog` with the required `facility_id / covenant_id / report_id / correlation_id` fields\n4. **Auth**: add JWT middleware at the API boundary\n5. **Event sourcing**: replace direct DB writes with domain events for a full audit trail\n6. **Alembic migrations**: already wired; run `alembic upgrade head` on deploy (done automatically in `docker compose up`)\n\n---\n\n## Assumptions\n\n- Status field comparisons are case-insensitive (originators send `\"open\"`, `\"Open\"`, `\"OPEN\"`)\n- `repayment_months` for Nomina uses a floor of 1 when origination and maturity fall in the same calendar month\n- The `amount` field present in all originator payloads maps to the `BaseAsset.amount` field (original disbursement basis); facility-specific outstanding amounts drive calculations\n- A calculation with zero eligible assets raises an error rather than publishing a zero-rate report, since a zero result would be meaningless and potentially misleading as a covenant\n"}
```

78	
79	class EducaCalculator(FacilityCalculator):
80	    """
81	    Calculates the Weighted Average Loan IRR for Facility A — Educa Capital I.
82	
83	    Formula: Σ(outstanding_amount_i × interest_rate_percentage_i) / Σ(outstanding_amount_i)
84	    Threshold: effective rate must be below 22.0%.
85	    """
86	
87	    def __init__(self) -> None:
88	        self._mapper = EducaMapper()
89	        self._policy = EducaEligibilityPolicy()
90	
91	    def calculate(
92	        self,
93	        raw_assets: list[dict],  # type: ignore[type-arg]
94	        facility_id: str,
95	        correlation_id: str,
96	    ) -> CovenantReport:
97	        included: list[str] = []
98	        excluded: list[ExcludedAsset] = []
99	        weighted_sum = Decimal("0")
100	        total_outstanding = Decimal("0")
101	
102	        for raw in raw_assets:
103	            asset = self._mapper.map(raw)
104	            eligible, reasons = self._policy.check(asset)
105	            if eligible:
106	                included.append(asset.external_id)
107	                weighted_sum += asset.outstanding_amount * asset.interest_rate_percentage  # type: ignore[operator]
108	                total_outstanding += asset.outstanding_amount
109	            else:
110	                excluded.append(
111	                    ExcludedAsset(external_id=asset.external_id, reasons=reasons)
112	                )
```

100	
101	class NominaCalculator(FacilityCalculator):
102	    """
103	    Calculates the Weighted Average Annualized Advance Fee for Facility C.
104	
105	    Formula per eligible asset:
106	      repayment_months_i = calendar months between origination_date and maturity_date
107	      annualized_fee_i   = fee_percentage_i × (12 / repayment_months_i)

80	class PayEarlyCalculator(FacilityCalculator):
81	    """
82	    Calculates the Portfolio Fee Yield for Facility B — PayEarly US.
83	
84	    EWA products carry 0% interest; the effective rate is derived from the fee
85	    structure relative to outstanding principal, annualized by loan tenor.
86	
87	    Formula per eligible asset:
88	      tenor_days_i = (due_date - created_at.date()).days
89	      fee_yield_i  = (total_fee_amount_i / total_principal_amount_i) × (365 / tenor_days_i)
90	
91	    Portfolio rate:
92	      Effective Rate = Σ(outstanding_principal_i × fee_yield_i) / Σ(outstanding_principal_i)
93	
94	    Threshold: effective rate must be below 3.0%.
95	    """
96	
97	    def __init__(self) -> None:
98	        self._mapper = PayEarlyMapper()
99	        self._policy = PayEarlyEligibilityPolicy()
```

19	
20	def _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(date_str: str) -> "datetime":
21	    """Parse DD/MM/YYYY date format used by Nomina Express."""
22	    from datetime import date
23	
24	    day, month, year = date_str.split("/")
25	    return date(int(year), int(month), int(day))
26	
27	
28	def _repayment_months(origination_date: "datetime", maturity_str: str) -> Decimal:
29	    """
30	    Calculate the number of whole calendar months between origination and maturity.
31	    Uses ceiling to handle partial months (at least 1 month is assumed).
32	    """
33	    from datetime import date
34	
35	    maturity = _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(maturity_str)
36	    orig = origination_date if isinstance(origination_date, date) else origination_date
37	
38	    months = (  # type: ignore[union-attr]
39	        (maturity.year - orig.year) * 12 + (maturity.month - orig.month)
40	    )
41	    if months < 1:
42	        months = 1
43	    return Decimal(str(months))
```

{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/domain/calculations/nomina.py","old_string":"def _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(date_str: str) -> \"datetime\":\n    \"\"\"Parse DD/MM/YYYY date format used by Nomina Express.\"\"\"\n    from datetime import date\n\n    day, month, year = date_str.split(\"/\")\n    return date(int(year), int(month), int(day))\n\n\ndef _repayment_months(origination_date: \"datetime\", maturity_str: str) -> Decimal:\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculate the number of whole calendar months between origination and maturity.\n    Uses ceiling to handle partial months (at least 1 month is assumed).\n    \"\"\"\n    from datetime import date\n\n    maturity = _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(maturity_str)\n    orig = origination_date if isinstance(origination_date, date) else origination_date\n\n    months = (  # type: ignore[union-attr]\n        (maturity.year - orig.year) * 12 + (maturity.month - orig.month)\n    )","new_string":"def _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(date_str: str) -> date:\n    \"\"\"Parse DD/MM/YYYY date format used by Nomina Express.\"\"\"\n    day, month, year = date_str.split(\"/\")\n    return date(int(year), int(month), int(day))\n\n\ndef _repayment_months(origination_date: date, maturity_str: str) -> Decimal:\n    \"\"\"\n    Calculate the number of whole calendar months between origination and maturity.\n    Uses ceiling to handle partial months (at least 1 month is assumed).\n    \"\"\"\n    maturity = _parse_dd_mm_yyyy(maturity_str)\n    months = (\n        (maturity.year - origination_date.year) * 12\n        + (maturity.month - origination_date.month)\n    )"}

## USER

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of the Fence Covenant Calculation Platform based on a tech challenge PDF ("Tech_Challenge_Instructions_Senior_Product_Engineering.pdf"). The system must: (1) ingest portfolio data from three facilities with different asset data models, (2) apply facility-specific covenant calculations, (3) produce auditable covenant reports, and (4) publish them immutably to a database (or smart contract). The user first requested a Plan, approved it, then implementation began. The full DDD architecture defined in CLAUDE.md and `.claude/rules/` files must be followed strictly. TDD is mandatory. All financial math must use `Decimal`. Docker Compose with `api` + `postgres` services is required.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Domain Driven Design (DDD)** — strict layering: Interfaces → Application → Domain ← Infrastructure
   - **Strategy Pattern** — per-facility: `FacilityCalculator`, `EligibilityPolicy`, `FacilityMapper` abstractions
   - **Repository Pattern** — domain interfaces, infrastructure implementations
   - **Publisher abstraction** — `Publisher` interface with `DatabasePublisher` (default) and `SmartContractPublisher` (stub)
   - **Decimal arithmetic** — all financial math uses `Decimal`, never `float`, with `ROUND_HALF_UP` to 2dp
   - **TDD** — tests written before implementation (red/green/refactor)
   - **Three facilities**:
     - Facility A (Educa Capital I): Weighted Average Loan IRR — `Σ(outstanding×rate)/Σ(outstanding)`, threshold < 22.0%
     - Facility B (PayEarly US): Portfolio Fee Yield — fee_yield annualized by tenor, threshold < 3.0%
     - Facility C (Nomina Express I): Weighted Avg Annualized Advance Fee — annualized by repayment months, threshold < 5.0%
   - **CovenantStatus**: `COMPLIANT` (rate < threshold) or `BREACH`
   - **Immutable reports** — append-only; each calculation creates a new DB row
   - **FastAPI** with Pydantic v2, SQLAlchemy, Alembic, psycopg2-binary
   - **SQLite** used for integration tests (not PostgreSQL testcontainers)
   - **Coverage targets**: ≥90% overall, 100% for `app/domain/calculations/`
   - **mypy strict**, black, flake8 must all pass

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`pyproject.toml`** — Project config with hatchling build backend. Key fix: added `[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ["app"]`. Pytest configured with `--cov=app --cov-report=term-missing`, coverage `fail_under=90`.

   - **`app/settings.py`** — Pydantic Settings loading from `.env`:
     ```python
     class Settings(BaseSettings):
         model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=".env", extra="ignore")
         database_url: str = "postgresql://fence:fence@localhost:5432/fence"
         publisher_backend: str = "database"
         log_level: str = "INFO"
     ```

   - **`app/domain/errors.py`** — Four domain exceptions (no HTTPException dependency):
     ```python
     class FacilityNotSupported(Exception): ...
     class InvalidPortfolioData(Exception): ...
     class CovenantCalculationError(Exception): ...
     class CovenantPublicationError(Exception): ...
     ```

   - **`app/domain/asset/base.py`**:
     ```python
     class BaseAsset(BaseModel):
         external_id: str
         amount: Decimal
         is_eligible: bool
     ```

   - **`app/domain/asset/educa.py`** — EducaAsset with `status`, `loan_status`, `outstanding_amount`, `interest_rate_percentage: Optional[Decimal]`, dates, etc.

   - **`app/domain/asset/payearly.py`** — PayEarlyAsset with `status`, `outstanding_principal_amount`, `total_principal_amount`, `total_fee_amount`, `created_at: datetime`, `due_date: date`, etc.

   - **`app/domain/asset/nomina.py`** — NominaAsset with `status`, `outstanding_amount`, `fee_percentage`, `origination_date`, `maturity_date: str` (DD/MM/YYYY), etc.

   - **`app/domain/covenant/entities.py`**:
     ```python
     class CovenantStatus(str, Enum):
         COMPLIANT = "COMPLIANT"
         BREACH = "BREACH"

     class ExcludedAsset(BaseModel):
         external_id: str
         reasons: list[str]

     class CovenantReport(BaseModel):
         report_id: UUID
         facility_id: str
         effective_rate: Decimal
         threshold: Decimal
         status: CovenantStatus
         total_assets: int
         included_assets: list[str]
         excluded_assets: list[ExcludedAsset]
         computed_at: datetime
         correlation_id: str
     ```

   - **`app/domain/covenant/repository.py`** — ABC with `save`, `find_by_id`, `find_by_facility` methods.

   - **`app/domain/facility/interfaces.py`** — Updated to use `dict[str, Any]`:
     ```python
     class EligibilityPolicy(ABC):
         @abstractmethod
         def check(self, asset: BaseAsset) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]: ...

     class FacilityMapper(ABC):
         @abstractmethod
         def map(self, raw: dict[str, Any]) -> BaseAsset: ...

     class FacilityCalculator(ABC):
         @abstractmethod
         def calculate(self, raw_assets: list[dict[str, Any]], facility_id: str, correlation_id: str) -> CovenantReport: ...
     ```

   - **`app/domain/publishers/interface.py`** — Publisher ABC.

   - **`app/domain/calculations/educa.py`** — EducaEligibilityPolicy (status.lower()=="open", is_eligible, loan_status=="current", rate not None), EducaMapper (uses `dict[str, Any]`), EducaCalculator. Key fix: used `assert asset.interest_rate_percentage is not None` before multiplication to satisfy mypy. Added `from typing import Any`.

   - **`app/domain/calculations/payearly.py`** — PayEarlyEligibilityPolicy (status.lower()=="performing", is_eligible, outstanding_principal>0), PayEarlyMapper, PayEarlyCalculator. Formula: `fee_yield = (total_fee/total_principal)*(365/tenor_days)`, then weighted avg × 100 for percentage.

   - **`app/domain/calculations/nomina.py`** — NominaEligibilityPolicy (status.lower()=="active", is_eligible, outstanding_amount>0), NominaMapper, NominaCalculator. Key fixes: `_parse_dd_mm_yyyy` return type changed from `"datetime"` to `date`; `_repayment_months` parameter changed from `"datetime"` to `date`; removed local imports; removed `orig` variable; `months = ((maturity.year - origination_date.year)*12 + (maturity.month - origination_date.month))`. Added `from datetime import date, datetime, timezone` and `from typing import Any`.

   - **`app/application/registry.py`** — FacilityRegistry with `register` and `get` (raises `FacilityNotSupported`).

   - **`app/application/commands/calculate_covenant.py`**:
     ```python
     class CalculateCovenantCommand(BaseModel):
         facility_id: str
         assets: list[dict[str, Any]]
         correlation_id: str
     ```

   - **`app/application/use_cases/calculate_covenant.py`** — `execute`: registry.get → calculator.calculate → repository.save → publisher.publish → return report.

   - **`app/application/use_cases/get_covenant_report.py`** — GetCovenantReportUseCase + ListCovenantReportsUseCase. Fixed: removed unused `from uuid import UUID` import.

   - **`app/infrastructure/database/models.py`** — CovenantReportModel with `Mapped[list[Any]]` for JSON columns. Added `from typing import Any`.

   - **`app/infrastructure/database/session.py`** — SQLAlchemy engine from settings.database_url, get_session generator.

   - **`app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_covenant_report_repository.py`** — Implements CovenantReportRepository. `save` wraps exceptions as `CovenantPublicationError`. `find_by_id`, `find_by_facility` using SQLAlchemy Session.

   - **`app/infrastructure/publishers/database_publisher.py`** — Logs publication event with structured fields.

   - **`app/infrastructure/publishers/smart_contract_publisher.py`** — Documented stub for future web3.py integration. Fixed long line in docstring.

   - **`alembic/versions/0001_create_covenant_reports.py`** — Creates `covenant_reports` table with UUID PK, JSON columns, Numeric(20,10) for rates.

   - **`app/interfaces/api/schemas/request.py`** — `CalculateCovenantRequest` with `assets: list[dict[str, Any]]`.

   - **`app/interfaces/api/schemas/response.py`** — CovenantReportResponse with `effective_rate: str`, `threshold: str`, `summary: ReportSummary`.

   - **`app/interfaces/api/exception_handlers.py`** — All four handlers accept `Exception` (not subclass) to satisfy mypy.

   - **`app/interfaces/api/dependencies.py`** — `@lru_cache get_registry()` registers all three calculators. Publisher selected by `settings.publisher_backend`.

   - **`app/interfaces/api/routers/covenants.py`** — Three endpoints: `POST /{facility_id}/calculate`, `GET /{facility_id}/reports/{report_id}`, `GET /{facility_id}/reports`.

   - **`app/main.py`** — FastAPI app with four exception handlers registered (no `type: ignore` needed after handler signature fix).

   - **`tests/conftest.py`** — SQLite test engine, db_session fixture, api_client with dependency overrides, educa/payearly/nomina asset fixtures loading from data/*.json.

   - **`tests/unit/domain/calculations/test_educa_calculator.py`** — Tests eligibility policy, mapper, calculator including COMPLIANT/BREACH thresholds.

   - **`tests/unit/domain/calculations/test_payearly_calculator.py`** — Same structure. Key: fee_yield for asset with principal=8500, fee=1.75, tenor=273 days → 0.03% (not 0.28% as originally miscalculated).

   - **`tests/unit/domain/calculations/test_nomina_calculator.py`** — Tests DD/MM/YYYY parsing, repayment months calculation.

   - **`tests/unit/domain/calculations/test_coverage_gaps.py`** — Tests wrong asset type passed to policies, malformed data in mappers, same-month floor (nomina min 1 month gives annualized_fee = 2.0*(12/1) = 24%).

   - **`tests/unit/test_publishers.py`** — Tests DatabasePublisher.publish, SmartContractPublisher.publish (no error), repo save error wrapping.

   - **`tests/integration/test_api_covenants.py`** — Full end-to-end tests for all three facilities, exclusion counts, status, GET by ID, LIST.

   - **`tests/integration/test_postgres_repository.py`** — save/find_by_id/find_by_facility/immutability tests.

   - **`tests/integration/test_error_handlers.py`** — Tests 422/500/500 responses for InvalidPortfolioData, CovenantCalculationError, CovenantPublicationError.

   - **`data/facility_a_educa_isa.json`** — 8 assets with deliberate status casing variations (open/Open/OPEN).
   - **`data/facility_b_payearly_ewa.json`** — 8 assets with status variations (performing/PERFORMING/Performing/defaulted/repaid).
   - **`data/facility_c_nomina.json`** — 8 assets with status variations (active/ACTIVE/past_due/written_off/settled), DD/MM/YYYY maturity dates.

   - **`README.md`** — Architecture, formulas per facility, API docs, trade-offs, production path.

4. Errors and fixes:

   - **hatchling build failure**: Missing `[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ["app"]` in pyproject.toml. Fixed by adding that section.

   - **PayEarly test_fee_yield_calculation wrong expected value**: Original test expected `Decimal("0.28")` but actual result was `Decimal("0.03")`. The fee_yield formula gives `(1.75/8500)*(365/273) = 0.000275...`, as percentage = 0.0275%, rounds to 0.03%. Fixed by correcting test assertion.

   - **flake8 violations** after black formatting:
     - F401 unused imports in `get_covenant_report.py`, test files, `test_coverage_gaps.py`, `test_publishers.py`
     - E501 long lines in calculation docstrings, error messages, main.py
     - Fixed by removing unused imports and shortening strings/docstrings

   - **mypy errors**:
     - `dict` without type args → changed to `dict[str, Any]` throughout
     - `_parse_dd_mm_yyyy` annotated as returning `"datetime"` but actually returns `date` → fixed return type
     - `_repayment_months` parameter typed as `"datetime"` but receives `date` → fixed to accept `date`

     - `Mapped[list]` without type args → changed to `Mapped[list[Any]]`

     - Exception handler signatures accepting specific exception types not `Exception` → changed all to `Exception`
     - Stale `# type: ignore[override]` on mapper methods (valid once `dict[str, Any]` matched interface) → removed
     - Stale `# type: ignore[type-arg]` on calculate methods → removed after fixing to `list[dict[str, Any]]`

   - **black reformatted files after mypy edits**: `app/main.py` and `app/domain/calculations/nomina.py` need re-running `black .`. This is the current stopping point.

5. Problem Solving:
   - TDD cycle maintained throughout: tests written first (confirmed failing), then implementations made them pass
   - 100% coverage on calculations module achieved via dedicated gap-coverage tests
   - SQLite used for integration tests instead of PostgreSQL testcontainers (simpler for CI)
   - Status case-insensitivity handled in EligibilityPolicy with `.lower()` comparison
   - Nomina's `maturity_date` DD/MM/YYYY format parsed in mapper
   - Immutability enforced by append-only repository (no updates)

6	
7	from app.application.registry import FacilityRegistry
8	from app.application.use_cases.calculate_covenant import CalculateCovenantUseCase
9	from app.application.use_cases.get_covenant_report import (
10	    GetCovenantReportUseCase,
11	    ListCovenantReportsUseCase,
12	)
13	from app.domain.covenant.repository import CovenantReportRepository
14	from app.domain.publishers.interface import Publisher
15	from app.infrastructure.database.session import get_session
16	from app.infrastructure.publishers.database_publisher import DatabasePublisher
17	from app.infrastructure.publishers.smart_contract_publisher import (
18	    SmartContractPublisher,
19	)

21	    PostgresCovenantReportRepository,
22	)

25	
26	@lru_cache
27	def get_registry() -> FacilityRegistry:
28	    from app.domain.calculations.educa import EducaCalculator
29	    from app.domain.calculations.nomina import NominaCalculator
30	    from app.domain.calculations.payearly import PayEarlyCalculator
31	
32	    registry = FacilityRegistry()
33	    registry.register("facility-a", EducaCalculator())
34	    registry.register("facility-b", PayEarlyCalculator())
35	    registry.register("facility-c", NominaCalculator())
36	    return registry
37	
38	
39	def get_db_session() -> Generator[Session, None, None]:
40	    yield from get_session()
41	
42	
43	def get_repository(
44	    session: Session = Depends(get_db_session),
45	) -> CovenantReportRepository:
46	    return PostgresCovenantReportRepository(session)
47	
48	
49	def get_publisher(
50	    repository: CovenantReportRepository = Depends(get_repository),
51	) -> Publisher:
52	    if settings.publisher_backend == "smart_contract":
53	        return SmartContractPublisher()
54	    return DatabasePubli

## ASSISTANT

Good picture of the codebase. Here's my plan before writing any code:

- **Domain**: `AssetRecord` entity (id, facility_id, external_id, status, amount, is_eligible, raw, ingested_at) + `AssetRepository` ABC
- **Infrastructure**: `AssetModel` DB table with UniqueConstraint on `(facility_id, external_id)`, `PostgresAssetRepository`
- **Application**: `IngestAssetsCommand` + `IngestAssetsUseCase` — pre-checks for existing IDs, saves new, returns `(saved, duplicates)` lists
- **API**: `POST /api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/assets` → `{ saved: [...], duplicates: [...], saved_count, duplicate_count }`
- **Migration**: `0002_create_assets.py`

TDD — tests first.

Any\nfrom unittest.mock import MagicMock\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.application.commands.ingest_assets import IngestAssetsCommand\nfrom app.application.use_cases.ingest_assets import IngestAssetsUseCase\nfrom app.domain.asset.record import AssetRecord\n\n\ndef _make_raw(external_id: str, status: str = \"open\") -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"external_id\": external_id,\n        \"status\": status,\n        \"amount\": \"1000.00\",\n        \"is_eligible\": True,\n    }\n\n\ndef _make_record(external_id: str) -> AssetRecord:\n    return AssetRecord(\n        id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        external_id=external_id,\n        status=\"open\",\n        amount=Decimal(\"1000.00\"),\n        is_eligible=True,\n        raw=_make_raw(external_id),\n        ingested_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n    )\n\n\ndef test_ingest_new_assets_saves_all() -> None:\n    repo = MagicMock()\n    repo.find_existing_external_ids.return_value = set()\n\n    use_case = IngestAssetsUseCase(repository=repo)\n    command = IngestAssetsCommand(\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        assets=[_make_raw(\"A1\"), _make_raw(\"A2\")],\n    )\n    result = use_case.execute(command)\n\n    assert result.saved == [\"A1\", \"A2\"]\n    assert result.duplicates == []\n    assert result.saved_count == 2\n    assert result.duplicate_count == 0\n    repo.save_batch.assert_called_once()\n\n\ndef test_ingest_skips_duplicates() -> None:\n    repo = MagicMock()\n    repo.find_existing_external_ids.return_value = {\"A1\"}\n\n    use_case = IngestAssetsUseCase(repository=repo)\n    command = IngestAssetsCommand(\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        assets=[_make_raw(\"A1\"), _make_raw(\"A2\")],\n    )\n    result = use_case.execute(command)\n\n    assert result.saved == [\"A2\"]\n    assert result.duplicates == [\"A1\"]\n    assert result.saved_count == 1\n    assert result.duplicate_count == 1\n    repo.save_batch.assert_called_once()\n    saved_records = repo.save_batch.call_args[0][0]\n    assert len(saved_records) == 1\n    assert saved_records[0].external_id == \"A2\"\n\n\ndef test_ingest_all_duplicates_saves_nothing() -> None:\n    repo = MagicMock()\n    repo.find_existing_external_ids.return_value = {\"A1\", \"A2\"}\n\n    use_case = IngestAssetsUseCase(repository=repo)\n    command = IngestAssetsCommand(\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        assets=[_make_raw(\"A1\"), _make_raw(\"A2\")],\n    )\n    result = use_case.execute(command)\n\n    assert result.saved == []\n    assert result.duplicates == [\"A1\", \"A2\"]\n    repo.save_batch.assert_not_called()\n\n\ndef test_ingest_missing_external_id_raises() -> None:\n    repo = MagicMock()\n    repo.find_existing_external_ids.return_value = set()\n\n    use_case = IngestAssetsUseCase(repository=repo)\n    command = IngestAssetsCommand(\n        facility_id=\"facility-a\",\n        assets=[{\"status\": \"open\", \"amount\": \"100\"}],  # no external_id\n    )\n    from app.domain.errors import InvalidPortfolioData\n\n    with pytest.raises(InvalidPortfolioData):\n        use_case.execute(command)\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/integration/test_asset_repository.py","content":"from datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom decimal import Decimal\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nimport pytest\n\nfrom app.domain.asset.record import AssetRecord\nfrom app.infrastructure.repositories.postgres_asset_repository import (\n    PostgresAssetRepository,\n)\n\n\ndef _make_record(facility_id: str, external_id: str) -> AssetRecord:\n    return AssetRecord(\n        id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=facility_id,\n        external_id=external_id,\n        status=\"open\",\n        amount=Decimal(\"5000.00\"),\n        is_eligible=True,\n        raw={\"external_id\": external_id, \"status\": \"open\", \"amount\": \"5000.00\"},\n        ingested_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n    )\n\n\ndef test_save_batch_and_find_existing(db_session) -> None:\n    repo = PostgresAssetRepository(db_session)\n    records = [\n        _make_record(\"facility-a\", \"EXT-001\"),\n        _make_record(\"facility-a\", \"EXT-002\"),\n    ]\n    repo.save_batch(records)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    existing = repo.find_existing_external_ids(\"facility-a\", [\"EXT-001\", \"EXT-002\", \"EXT-003\"])\n    assert existing == {\"EXT-001\", \"EXT-002\"}\n\n\ndef test_find_existing_empty_when_none(db_session) -> None:\n    repo = PostgresAssetRepository(db_session)\n    existing = repo.find_existing_external_ids(\"facility-x\", [\"UNKNOWN-1\"])\n    assert existing == set()\n\n\ndef test_find_by_facility_returns_saved(db_session) -> None:\n    repo = PostgresAssetRepository(db_session)\n    record = _make_record(\"facility-b\", \"EXT-B-001\")\n    repo.save_batch([record])\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    results = repo.find_by_facility(\"facility-b\")\n    assert any(r.external_id == \"EXT-B-001\" for r in results)\n\n\ndef test_unique_constraint_same_facility(db_session) -> None:\n    from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\n\n    repo = PostgresAssetRepository(db_session)\n    record = _make_record(\"facility-a\", \"EXT-DUPE\")\n    repo.save_batch([record])\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    duplicate = _make_record(\"facility-a\", \"EXT-DUPE\")\n    repo.save_batch([duplicate])\n    with pytest.raises(IntegrityError):\n        db_session.flush()\n\n\ndef test_same_external_id_different_facility_allowed(db_session) -> None:\n    repo = PostgresAssetRepository(db_session)\n    r1 = _make_record(\"facility-a\", \"EXT-SHARED\")\n    r2 = _make_record(\"facility-b\", \"EXT-SHARED\")\n    repo.save_batch([r1, r2])\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    a_ids = repo.find_existing_external_ids(\"facility-a\", [\"EXT-SHARED\"])\n    b_ids = repo.find_existing_external_ids(\"facility-b\", [\"EXT-SHARED\"])\n    assert a_ids == {\"EXT-SHARED\"}\n    assert b_ids == {\"EXT-SHARED\"}\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/tests/integration/test_api_assets.py","content":"\"\"\"Integration tests for the asset ingestion endpoint.\"\"\"\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\ndef _educa_raw(external_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\n        \"external_id\": external_id,\n        \"status\": \"open\",\n        \"amount\": \"10000.00\",\n        \"is_eligible\": True,\n        \"loan_status\": \"current\",\n        \"outstanding_amount\": \"9500.00\",\n        \"interest_rate_percentage\": \"18.5\",\n        \"effective_date\": \"2024-01-01\",\n        \"reporting_date\": \"2024-06-01\",\n        \"student_id\": \"STU-001\",\n        \"school_id\": \"SCH-001\",\n        \"disbursement_amount\": \"10000.00\",\n        \"repaid_amount\": \"500.00\",\n        \"days_past_due\": 0,\n        \"country\": \"ES\",\n    }\n\n\ndef test_ingest_assets_new(api_client) -> None:\n    body = {\"assets\": [_educa_raw(\"NEW-001\"), _educa_raw(\"NEW-002\")]}\n    resp = api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body)\n    assert resp.status_code == 200\n    data = resp.json()\n    assert set(data[\"saved\"]) == {\"NEW-001\", \"NEW-002\"}\n    assert data[\"duplicates\"] == []\n    assert data[\"saved_count\"] == 2\n    assert data[\"duplicate_count\"] == 0\n\n\ndef test_ingest_assets_with_duplicates(api_client) -> None:\n    body = {\"assets\": [_educa_raw(\"DUP-001\")]}\n    api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body)\n\n    # Second call with same + new asset\n    body2 = {\"assets\": [_educa_raw(\"DUP-001\"), _educa_raw(\"DUP-NEW-001\")]}\n    resp = api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body2)\n    assert resp.status_code == 200\n    data = resp.json()\n    assert data[\"saved\"] == [\"DUP-NEW-001\"]\n    assert data[\"duplicates\"] == [\"DUP-001\"]\n    assert data[\"saved_count\"] == 1\n    assert data[\"duplicate_count\"] == 1\n\n\ndef test_ingest_assets_all_duplicates(api_client) -> None:\n    body = {\"assets\": [_educa_raw(\"ALLDUPE-001\")]}\n    api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body)\n\n    resp = api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body)\n    assert resp.status_code == 200\n    data = resp.json()\n    assert data[\"saved\"] == []\n    assert data[\"duplicates\"] == [\"ALLDUPE-001\"]\n    assert data[\"saved_count\"] == 0\n    assert data[\"duplicate_count\"] == 1\n\n\ndef test_ingest_assets_missing_external_id_returns_422(api_client) -> None:\n    body = {\"assets\": [{\"status\": \"open\", \"amount\": \"100\", \"is_eligible\": True}]}\n    resp = api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json=body)\n    assert resp.status_code == 422\n\n\ndef test_ingest_assets_empty_list_returns_empty(api_client) -> None:\n    resp = api_client.post(\"/api/v1/covenants/facility-a/assets\", json={\"assets\": []})\n    assert resp.status_code == 200\n    data = resp.json()\n    assert data[\"saved\"] == []\n    assert data[\"duplicates\"] == []\n"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/application/use_cases/ingest_assets.py","content":"from datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom decimal import Decimal\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\n\nfrom app.application.commands.ingest_assets import IngestAssetsCommand\nfrom app.domain.asset.record import AssetRecord\nfrom app.domain.asset.repository import AssetRepository\nfrom app.domain.errors import InvalidPortfolioData\n\n\nclass IngestAssetsResult(BaseModel):\n    \"\"\"\n    Result of an asset ingestion operation.\n\n    - saved: external_ids of newly persisted assets\n    - duplicates: external_ids that already existed for this facility\n    \"\"\"\n\n    saved: list[str]\n    duplicates: list[str]\n    saved_count: int\n    duplicate_count: int\n\n\ndef _extract_record(facility_id: str, raw: dict[str, Any]) -> AssetRecord:\n    try:\n        external_id = str(raw[\"external_id\"])\n        status = str(raw.get(\"status\", \"\"))\n        amount = Decimal(str(raw.get(\"amount\", \"0\")))\n        is_eligible = bool(raw.get(\"is_eligible\", False))\n    except KeyError as exc:\n        raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Missing required field: {exc}\") from exc\n    except Exception as exc:\n        raise InvalidPortfolioData(f\"Invalid asset data: {exc}\") from exc\n\n    return AssetRecord(\n        id=uuid4(),\n        facility_id=facility_id,\n        external_id=external_id,\n        status=status,\n        amount=amount,\n        is_eligible=is_eligible,\n        raw=raw,\n        ingested_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),\n    )\n\n\nclass IngestAssetsUseCase:\n    \"\"\"\n    Business context: Accepts a batch of raw asset dicts for a facility,\n    deduplicates against already-stored records (by facility_id + external_id),\n    persists new assets, and reports which were saved vs skipped.\n\n    Assumptions:\n    - Each raw asset must contain an `external_id` field.\n    - Duplicates are silently discarded; callers are notified via the result.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, repository: AssetRepository) -> None:\n        self._repository = repository\n\n    def execute(self, command: IngestAssetsCommand) -> IngestAssetsResult:\n        records = [_extract_record(command.facility_id, raw) for raw in command.assets]\n\n        if not records:\n            return IngestAssetsResult(\n                saved=[], duplicates=[], saved_count=0, duplicate_count=0\n            )\n\n        all_ids = [r.external_id for r in records]\n        existing = self._repository.find_existing_external_ids(\n            command.facility_id, all_ids\n        )\n\n        new_records = [r for r in records if r.external_id not in existing]\n        duplicate_ids = [r.external_id for r in records if r.external_id in existing]\n\n        if new_records:\n            self._repository.save_batch(new_records)\n\n        return IngestAssetsResult(\n            saved=[r.external_id for r in new_records],\n            duplicates=duplicate_ids,\n            saved_count=len(new_records),\n            duplicate_count=len(duplicate_ids),\n        )\n"}
```

{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/database/models.py","old_string":"from datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, DateTime, Integer, Numeric, String\nfrom sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID as PG_UUID\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column\n\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.base import Base\n\n\nclass CovenantReportModel(Base):","new_string":"from datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Integer, Numeric, String, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID as PG_UUID\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column\n\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.base import Base\n\n\nclass AssetModel(Base):\n    \"\"\"\n    Persisted raw asset record for a facility.\n\n    `raw` holds the complete original payload for auditability.\n    The (facility_id, external_id) pair is unique — duplicate ingestion is rejected.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    __tablename__ = \"assets\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\"facility_id\", \"external_id\", name=\"uq_asset_facility_external\"),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[UUID] = mapped_column(PG_UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True)\n    facility_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False, index=True)\n    external_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False)\n    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False)\n    amount: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Numeric(20, 10), nullable=False)\n    is_eligible: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)\n    raw: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\n    ingested_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False\n    )\n\n\nclass CovenantReportModel(Base):"}

{"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_asset_repository.py","content":"from decimal import Decimal\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.domain.asset.record import AssetRecord\nfrom app.domain.asset.repository import AssetRepository\nfrom app.domain.errors import CovenantPublicationError\nfrom app.infrastructure.database.models import AssetModel\n\n\nclass PostgresAssetRepository(AssetRepository):\n    \"\"\"SQLAlchemy implementation of the AssetRepository domain interface.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, session: Session) -> None:\n        self._session = session\n\n    def save_batch(self, records: list[AssetRecord]) -> None:\n        try:\n            for record in records:\n                model = AssetModel(\n                    id=record.id,\n                    facility_id=record.facility_id,\n                    external_id=record.external_id,\n                    status=record.status,\n                    amount=record.amount,\n                    is_eligible=record.is_eligible,\n                    raw=record.raw,\n                    ingested_at=record.ingested_at,\n                )\n                self._session.add(model)\n        except Exception as exc:\n            raise CovenantPublicationError(\n                f\"Failed to persist assets: {exc}\"\n            ) from exc\n\n    def find_existing_external_ids(\n        self, facility_id: str, external_ids: list[str]\n    ) -> set[str]:\n        if not external_ids:\n            return set()\n        rows = (\n            self._session.query(AssetModel.external_id)\n            .filter(\n                AssetModel.facility_id == facility_id,\n                AssetModel.external_id.in_(external_ids),\n            )\n            .all()\n        )\n        return {row.external_id for row in rows}\n\n    def find_by_facility(self, facility_id: str) -> list[AssetRecord]:\n        rows = (\n            self._session.query(AssetModel)\n            .filter(AssetModel.facility_id == facility_id)\n            .all()\n        )\n        return [_to_domain(row) for row in rows]\n\n\ndef _to_domain(model: AssetModel) -> AssetRecord:\n    return AssetRecord(\n        id=model.id,\n        facility_id=model.facility_id,\n        external_id=model.external_id,\n        status=model.status,\n        amount=Decimal(str(model.amount)),\n        is_eligible=bool(model.is_eligible),\n        raw=model.raw,\n        ingested_at=(\n            model.ingested_at\n            if model.ingested_at.tzinfo is not None\n            else model.ingested_at.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)\n        ),\n    )\n"}
```

## ASSISTANT

Two issues: (1) the session needs a flush after `save_batch` to be visible to subsequent queries on the same session, and (2) the unique constraint test needs to rollback after catching the IntegrityError to clean up session state. Fixing both:

---

## ASSISTANT

🔧 [tool: Edit]
```json
{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/home/antonio/Documentos/fence/app/infrastructure/repositories/postgres_asset_repository.py","old_string":"    def save_batch(self, records: list[AssetRecord]) -> None:\n        try:\n            for record in records:\n                model = AssetModel(\n                    id=record.id,\n                    facility_id=record.facility_id,\n                    external_id=record.external_id,\n                    status=record.status,\n                    amount=record.amount,\n                    is_eligible=record.is_eligible,\n                    raw=record.raw,\n                    ingested_at=record.ingested_at,\n                )\n                self._session.add(model)\n        except Exception as exc:\n            raise CovenantPublicationError(\n                f\"Failed to persist assets: {exc}\"\n            ) from exc","new_string":"    def save_batch(self, records: list[AssetRecord]) -> None:\n        try:\n            for record in records:\n                model = AssetModel(\n                    id=record.id,\n                    facility_id=record.facility_id,\n                    external_id=record.external_id,\n                    status=record.status,\n                    amount=record.amount,\n                    is_eligible=record.is_eligible,\n                    raw=record.raw,\n                    ingested_at=record.ingested_at,\n                )\n                self._session.add(model)\n            self._session.flush()\n        except Exception as exc:\n            raise CovenantPublicationError(\n                f\"Failed to persist assets: {exc}\"\n            ) from exc"}
```

## ASSISTANT

106 tests, 96.81% coverage, all checks green. Here's what was added:

**New endpoint:** `POST /api/v1/covenants/{facility_id}/assets`

**Request:**
```json
{ "assets": [{ "external_id": "EDU-001", "status": "open", "amount": "10000", ... }] }
```

**Response:**
```json
{ "saved": ["EDU-001", "EDU-002"], "duplicates": ["EDU-003"], "saved_count": 2, "duplicate_count": 1 }
```

**Key design decisions:**
- `assets` table has columns `id`, `facility_id`, `external_id`, `status`, `amount`, `is_eligible`, `raw` (JSON), `ingested_at` — `raw` stores the full original payload for debug
- `UniqueConstraint("facility_id", "external_id")` enforced at DB level (migration `0002_create_assets.py`)
- Duplicates are detected with a pre-check query before any insert — no try/catch on IntegrityError in the happy path
- Missing `external_id` raises `InvalidPortfolioData` → HTTP 422
- New layers follow the same DDD pattern: `AssetRecord` domain entity, `AssetRepository` ABC, `IngestAssetsUseCase`, `PostgresAssetRepository`

## USER

Improve insert asserts by facility to have precalculate the covenant to can get info on real time using the incremental aggregation pattern. To do this follow the next instructions:                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  * Create a new table on database facility_covenant_state to have precaculate effective rate, covenant status, facility_id, last update, accumulated denominator, accumulated numerator
  * Do row level locking when update data to avoid problems with concurtency and race condition. 

  * Lifecycle-Aware Formulas when isnert new data, and prepare system to future can have updates, but not implement now. 
    Calculate the individual components by facility:
     * facility_a:
       - asset_numerator = outstanding_amount * interest_rate_percentage
       - asset_denominator = outstanding_amount
     * facility_b:
       - asset_numerator = outstanding_principal_amount * fee_yield (where fee_yield = (total_fee_amount / total_principal_amount) * (365 / tenor_days))
       - asset_denominator = outstanding_principal_amount
     * facility_c:
       - asset_numerator = outstanding_amount * annualized_fee (where annualized_fee = fee_percentage * (12 / repayment_months))
       - asset_denominator = outstanding_amount
  * Imporve AssetRecord with a new boolean of Eligibility Criteria and reasons for exlcusion to can add on report when it is needed
